evidence.quote: Most of the information filed on the OBR, such as registered office or other address information, will be placed on the public record and is publicly available for searches under the business statutes.

evidence.basis: Ontario Business Registry (ontario.ca) — search products including profile report and certificate of status
evidence.quote: Anyone can search the OBR for free to get basic information about a business or not-for-profit organization. For more detailed information, you can order a search product directly through: the ministry an intermediary an authorized service provider Types of search products include: profile report – $8 document copies – $3 certificate of status – $26
evidence.note: Official ministry price list confirms the orderable 'profile report' (the Corporation Profile Report) and 'certificate of status' as ServiceOntario/ministry search products — the register-extract equivalents.

caveats: INFERENCE (contents): the ontario.ca page confirms the profile report product but does not itemise its contents; that it lists directors/officers, registered office, status and incorporation date rests on the established product format. It does NOT list shareholders.
The list-derived quote concatenates the page's bullet list items ('the ministry / an intermediary / an authorized service provider'; 'profile report – $8' etc.) in page order without bullet markers.

summary: Shareholders are never public. Only the organs are registered. More opaque than AT: there is no sole-shareholder registration duty.

evidence.basis: Art. 686 OR (Aktienbuch)
evidence.note: The Aktienbuch is a private internal document, never filed with the Handelsregisteramt and not publicly inspectable. Only Verwaltungsrat, signatories and Revisionsstelle are registered.

caveats: No sole-shareholder exception, unlike AT.

summary: The only genuine Swiss analogue to a filed §40-style list — but only for cooperatives whose statutes impose personal liability or Nachschusspflicht. Deposited and open to inspection; not entered in the register.

evidence.basis: Handelsregisteramt Kanton Zürich, Merkblatt 'Führung des Verzeichnisses der Genossenschaftsmitglieder' (11.12.2024), quoting Art. 837 OR
evidence.quote: Genossenschaften, deren Statuten eine persönliche Haftung oder Nachschusspflicht vorsehen, müssen dem Handelsregisteramt ein Verzeichnis der Genossenschafter einreichen. Dieses wird nicht ins Handelsregister eingetragen, steht jedoch zur Einsicht offen (Art. 837 OR).
evidence.note: The Genossenschafterliste is filed with the Handelsregisteramt and open to inspection, but is NOT entered in the register extract itself — hence an additional document rather than part of the base Auszug.

caveats: Obligation to file the list applies only to cooperatives whose statutes provide personal liability or a Nachschusspflicht.
The list's statutory basis is Art. 837 OR (filing/inspection) with change-notification under Art. 877 OR.

summary: No separate list. Members are statutory content of the register extract itself.

evidence.basis: Art. 791 Abs. 1 OR
evidence.quote: Die Gesellschafter sind mit Name, Wohnsitz und Heimatort sowie mit der Anzahl und dem Nennwert ihrer Stammanteile ins Handelsregister einzutragen.

caveats: Not cantonal: register content is set federally (OR + HRegV); cantonal offices only administer. Zefix is the central index.

summary: Shareholders of a Sociedad Anónima are recorded in the company's Registro de Accionistas, kept by the company (Reglamento de Sociedades Anónimas); Ley 18.046 art. 7 requires the company to keep an up-to-date list of shareholders available to its shareholders, not to the public and not filed with any registry. The public registry records only the founders named in the constitution/extract (art. 5), not later transfers. A current shareholder list is therefore not obtainable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Ley 18.046 sobre Sociedades Anónimas, art. 7
evidence.quote: Art. 7º La sociedad deberá mantener en la sede principal y en la de sus agencias o sucursales, así como en su sitio en Internet, en el caso de las sociedades anónimas abiertas que dispongan de tales medios, a disposición de los accionistas, ejemplares actualizados de sus estatutos... Deberá, asimismo, mantener una lista actualizada de los accionistas, con indicación del domicilio y número de acciones de cada cual.
evidence.note: The shareholder list is company-held and made available to shareholders — not a public registry filing.

caveats: The Registro de Accionistas / shareholder list is company-held under Ley 18.046 and the Reglamento de Sociedades Anónimas (D.S. 702/2011); it is not a public registry document.
Only founding shareholders are registry-visible via the extract; ongoing ownership is not.

For a sociedad anónima abierta, shareholding information may reach the CMF via disclosure obligations, but that is a supervisory filing, not a Registro de Comercio/RES document, and does not yield a general public shareholder list.

summary: Current shareholders of an SpA are recorded only in the company's own share register (Registro de Accionistas), which the company keeps and which is available for inspection by shareholders and administrators, not by the public and not filed with any registry (Código de Comercio art. 431). The public registry captures only the founding shareholders named in the constitution/extract (art. 426 No. 2), not subsequent transfers. A current shareholder list is therefore not obtainable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio, art. 431 (SpA)
evidence.quote: La sociedad llevará un registro en el que se anotará, a lo menos, el nombre, domicilio y cédula de identidad o rol único tributario de cada accionista, el número de acciones de que sea titular, la fecha en que éstas se hayan inscrito a su nombre... estará, en todo tiempo, disponible para su examen por cualquier accionista o administrador de la sociedad.
evidence.note: The share register is company-held and open only to shareholders/administrators — not a public registry filing.

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio, art. 426 No. 2 (SpA)
evidence.quote: El nombre de los accionistas concurrentes al instrumento de constitución;
evidence.note: Only founding shareholders appear in the publicly inscribed extract; later ownership changes are not registered publicly.

caveats: The company-held Registro de Accionistas is not a public registry document; only founders are registry-visible.

INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: RES-incorporated SpAs may maintain the share book electronically on the RES platform (the RES portal describes a 'Registro electrónico que permite mantener el libro de accionistas de la sociedad'), but this is company-controlled and not a public, third-party-obtainable proof of current shareholders.

documentLabel: Constitution / bylaws (escritura pública of constitution with its estatutos; or RES Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado for a cerrada under Ley 20.659)
documentLocal: Copia autorizada de la escritura pública de constitución y sus estatutos (notaría/archivero); o Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado del Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (RES) para la sociedad anónima cerrada acogida a la Ley 20.659
summary: A Sociedad Anónima's estatutos are contained in its escritura pública of constitution, but the public Registro de Comercio inscribes only the extracto — a summary — not the full bylaws (Ley 18.046 art. 5). The full constitution is obtained as a separate/additional document: a certified copy of the escritura from the notary/archivero, or the Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado from the RES for a cerrada incorporated under Ley 20.659. It is obtainable but is not the plain register extract.

evidence.basis: Ley 18.046 sobre Sociedades Anónimas, art. 5
evidence.quote: Un extracto de la escritura social, autorizado por el notario respectivo, deberá inscribirse en el Registro de Comercio... El extracto de la escritura de constitución deberá expresar: 1) El nombre y domicilio de los accionistas que concurran a su otorgamiento...
evidence.note: Only the extract (summary) is inscribed; the full estatutos live in the escritura, so the full constitution is a separate document.

evidence.basis: Ley 18.046 sobre Sociedades Anónimas, art. 7
evidence.quote: ...a disposición de los accionistas, ejemplares actualizados de sus estatutos firmados por el gerente, con indicación de la fecha y notaría en que se otorgó la escritura de constitución y la de sus modificaciones...
evidence.note: Confirms the estatutos originate in the notarial escritura; the company (not the registry) holds the consolidated estatutos.

evidence.basis: Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (Ley 20.659) — Preguntas Frecuentes oficiales, sección certificados
evidence.quote: Para acreditar que tu empresa o sociedad está constituida legalmente existe el Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado, que puede ser complementado con el de Anotaciones y el de Vigencia.
evidence.note: English gloss: 'To prove that your company is legally incorporated there is the Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado (updated-bylaws certificate), which can be complemented with the Anotaciones (annotations) and Vigencia (good standing) certificates.' Official RES portal documentation — confirms the exact certificate name and its function for companies under the simplified regime.

evidence.basis: Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (Ley 20.659) — FAQ: equivalence of simplified-regime certificates to traditional-registry documents
evidence.quote: La 'copia de inscripción de la constitución de una sociedad con anotaciones marginales, con vigencia' en el sistema tradicional, equivale a los certificados de 'estatuto actualizado', de 'vigencia' y de 'anotaciones', en conjunto, del sistema simplificado.
evidence.note: English gloss: 'The copy of the inscription of the company's constitution with marginal annotations and vigencia in the traditional system is equivalent to the estatuto actualizado, vigencia and anotaciones certificates, taken together, of the simplified system.' Confirms the full estatutos are delivered as a distinct certificate — additional to, not part of, the plain register extract.

caveats: For the traditional track, the public Registro de Comercio holds only the extracto; the full estatutos are obtained from the notarial escritura (copia autorizada), not the commercial registry itself.

For a sociedad anónima cerrada under Ley 20.659 the full estatutos are held in the RES and obtainable as a Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado — a distinct certificate from the vigencia extract; hence 'additional document'.

documentLabel: Constitution / bylaws (escritura or instrumento privado of constitution with its estatutos; or RES Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado)
documentLocal: Copia autorizada de la escritura pública o del instrumento privado protocolizado de constitución y sus estatutos (notaría/archivero); o Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado del Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (RES) para sociedades acogidas a la Ley 20.659
summary: The SpA's constitution carries its estatutos (Código de Comercio art. 425), but the public Registro de Comercio inscribes only the extracto — a summary — not the full bylaws (art. 426). The full constitution is therefore obtained as a separate/additional document: a certified copy of the escritura or protocolized private instrument from the notary/archivero for traditionally incorporated companies, or the Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado from the RES for simplified-regime companies. It is registry-adjacent and obtainable, but not the plain register extract.

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio, art. 425 (SpA)
evidence.quote: La sociedad se forma, existe y prueba por un acto de constitución social escrito, inscrito y publicado en los términos del artículo siguiente, que se perfeccionará mediante escritura pública o por instrumento privado suscrito por sus otorgantes, y cuyas firmas sean autorizadas por notario público... El acto de constitución de la sociedad irá acompañado de su estatuto...
evidence.note: The estatutos accompany the act of constitution (notarial escritura or protocolized private instrument).

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio, art. 426 (SpA)
evidence.quote: Dentro del plazo de sesenta días contados desde la fecha del acto de constitución social, un extracto del mismo, autorizado por el notario respectivo, deberá inscribirse en el Registro de Comercio... El extracto deberá expresar: 1.- El nombre de la sociedad;...
evidence.note: Only the extract (summary) is publicly inscribed; the full estatutos are not, so the full constitution is a separate document.

evidence.basis: Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (Ley 20.659) — Preguntas Frecuentes oficiales, sección certificados
evidence.quote: Para acreditar que tu empresa o sociedad está constituida legalmente existe el Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado, que puede ser complementado con el de Anotaciones y el de Vigencia.
evidence.note: English gloss: 'To prove that your company is legally incorporated there is the Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado (updated-bylaws certificate), which can be complemented with the Anotaciones (annotations) and Vigencia (good standing) certificates.' Official RES portal documentation — confirms the exact certificate name and its function for SpA/companies under the simplified regime.

evidence.basis: Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (Ley 20.659) — FAQ: equivalence of simplified-regime certificates to traditional-registry documents
evidence.quote: La 'copia de inscripción de la constitución de una sociedad con anotaciones marginales, con vigencia' en el sistema tradicional, equivale a los certificados de 'estatuto actualizado', de 'vigencia' y de 'anotaciones', en conjunto, del sistema simplificado.
evidence.note: English gloss: 'The copy of the inscription of the company's constitution with marginal annotations and vigencia in the traditional system is equivalent to the estatuto actualizado, vigencia and anotaciones certificates, taken together, of the simplified system.' Confirms the full estatutos are delivered as a distinct certificate — additional to, not part of, the plain register extract.

caveats: For the traditional track, the public Registro de Comercio holds only the extracto; the full estatutos are obtained from the notarial escritura (copia autorizada), not the commercial registry itself.

For the simplified track (Ley 20.659) the full estatutos are held in the RES and obtainable as a Certificado de Estatuto Actualizado — a distinct certificate from the vigencia extract; hence 'additional document'.

documentLabel: Register extract / certificate of good standing (inscription of the extracto in the Registro de Comercio; or RES Certificado de Vigencia for a cerrada under Ley 20.659)
documentLocal: Certificado de vigencia / copia de la inscripción del extracto en el Registro de Comercio (Conservador de Bienes Raíces); o Certificado de Vigencia del Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (RES) para la sociedad anónima cerrada acogida a la Ley 20.659
summary: A Sociedad Anónima is constituted by escritura pública whose extract, authorized by the notary, must be inscribed in the Registro de Comercio of the company's domicile and published once in the Diario Oficial within 60 days (Ley 18.046 art. 5). A register extract is thus obtainable as a base registry document: a certified copy of the inscription plus a certificate of good standing from the Conservador de Bienes Raíces. A sociedad anónima cerrada may alternatively be incorporated under the simplified regime (Ley 20.659) and obtain the equivalent Certificado de Vigencia from the RES.

evidence.basis: Ley 18.046 sobre Sociedades Anónimas, art. 5
evidence.quote: Art. 5º Un extracto de la escritura social, autorizado por el notario respectivo, deberá inscribirse en el Registro de Comercio correspondiente al domicilio de la sociedad y publicarse por una sola vez en el Diario Oficial. La inscripción y publicación deberán efectuarse dentro del plazo de 60 días contado desde la fecha de la escritura social.
evidence.note: Public register inscription of the extract; a register extract / certificate of vigencia derives from this inscription.

caveats: The register holds/derives an extract, not the full estatutos — see the GESELLSCHAFTSVERTRAG row.

Only a sociedad anónima cerrada is eligible for the simplified regime (Ley 20.659, RES). A sociedad anónima abierta must use the traditional Registro de Comercio + Diario Oficial track (and is also entered in the CMF registry).
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: exact RES certificate names not confirmed by a fetched verbatim source.

documentLabel: Register extract / certificate of good standing (inscription of the extracto in the Registro de Comercio; or RES Certificado de Vigencia)
documentLocal: Certificado de vigencia / copia de la inscripción del extracto en el Registro de Comercio (Conservador de Bienes Raíces); o Certificado de Vigencia del Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (RES) para sociedades acogidas a la Ley 20.659
summary: An SpA is formed by a written act of constitution whose extract must be inscribed in the Registro de Comercio of the company's domicile and published once in the Diario Oficial (Código de Comercio art. 426). A register extract is therefore obtainable as a base registry document: a certified copy of the inscription plus a certificate of good standing (certificado de vigencia) from the Conservador de Bienes Raíces. SpAs incorporated under the simplified electronic regime (Ley 20.659) instead obtain the equivalent Certificado de Vigencia directly from the Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (RES).

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio, art. 426 (SpA)
evidence.quote: Dentro del plazo de sesenta días contados desde la fecha del acto de constitución social, un extracto del mismo, autorizado por el notario respectivo, deberá inscribirse en el Registro de Comercio correspondiente al domicilio de la sociedad y publicarse por una sola vez en el Diario Oficial.
evidence.note: Establishes the public register inscription of the extract; a register extract / certificate of vigencia is derived from this inscription.

evidence.basis: Registro de Empresas y Sociedades (RES) portal, Ley 20.659
evidence.note: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: RES issues a Certificado de Vigencia for simplified-regime companies; exact certificate catalogue could not be fetched verbatim.

caveats: The register holds/derives an extract, not the full estatutos — see the GESELLSCHAFTSVERTRAG row.

Two incorporation tracks exist: traditional (escritura pública -> extracto in the Registro de Comercio of the Conservador de Bienes Raíces + Diario Oficial) and simplified electronic (Ley 20.659, RES / tuempresaenundia.cl). The obtainable extract differs by track.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: exact RES certificate names (Certificado de Vigencia) not confirmed by a fetched verbatim source; leychile/Ley 20.659 text was not retrievable during research.

summary: For a 股份有限公司 only the promoters/founders (发起人) are a registered/publicized particular (Registration Regulation Art. 8; Company Law Art. 32). The full body of general and public shareholders is held in the company's own register of shareholders (股东名册), which Company Law Art. 102 requires the company to prepare and keep at the company — it is not filed with or published by the registry. Therefore a complete member/shareholder list cannot be obtained from the registry.

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023) 第一百零二条
evidence.quote: 股份有限公司应当制作股东名册并置备于公司。
evidence.note: Register of shareholders is prepared and kept by the company, not the registry.

evidence.basis: 市场主体登记管理条例 第八条
evidence.quote: 有限责任公司股东、股份有限公司发起人、非公司企业法人出资人的姓名或者名称
evidence.note: Only 发起人 (promoters), not general shareholders, are a registration item for a JSC.
evidence.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/中华人民共和国市场主体登记管理条例

caveats: The promoters (发起人) ARE registry-provable via the base register extract, but they are not the full shareholder list; for a listed JSC the shareholder base changes continuously and sits with the company / securities depository (CSDC), never the enterprise register.
A 股东名册 can only be obtained from the company itself (or, for listed companies, via CSDC), so it is out of scope of registry sourcing.

documentLabel: Registered shareholder particulars within the enterprise register extract
documentLocal: 股东（投资人）登记信息（企业登记档案）
summary: For a 有限责任公司 the shareholders (股东) are a registered/filed particular under Art. 8 of the Registration Regulation and their names are publicized via GSXT under Company Law Art. 32. The certified register extract / registration archive therefore itself evidences the shareholders, so no separate document is needed. Note this is the registered investor list, not the company-kept 股东名册.

evidence.basis: 市场主体登记管理条例 第八条
evidence.quote: 有限责任公司股东、股份有限公司发起人、非公司企业法人出资人的姓名或者名称
evidence.note: LLC shareholders' names are an express registration item.
evidence.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/中华人民共和国市场主体登记管理条例

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023) 第五十六条
evidence.quote: 有限责任公司应当置备股东名册，记载下列事项：股东的姓名或者名称及住所；股东认缴和实缴的出资额、出资方式和出资日期……
evidence.note: The full 股东名册 is company-kept; however the registered shareholder identities overlap and are captured in the register extract itself.

caveats: The statutory 股东名册 (register of members) is maintained BY THE COMPANY (Art. 56), not by the registry; what the registry proves is the registered/publicized shareholder list, which for an LLC is the functional equivalent for KYC purposes.
Subscribed/paid-in contribution amounts and equity-change history are publicized by the company itself via GSXT (Company Law Art. 40), so completeness depends on the company's own filings.

documentLabel: Filed articles of association (enterprise archive copy)
documentLocal: 公司章程（企业档案 / 登记提交材料）
summary: As for any company, a 股份有限公司 must adopt articles of association under Company Law Art. 5, and the 章程 is submitted at registration and retained in the enterprise archive (企业档案) of the AMR. It is neither in the standard register extract nor on GSXT, so it is obtainable only as a separate archive document via an 企业档案 request. Provable from the registry, but as an additional document.

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023年) 第九十四条
evidence.quote: 设立股份有限公司，应当由发起人共同制订公司章程。
evidence.note: A joint stock company must have articles of association (公司章程) drawn up by its promoters — mandatory constitutional document.

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023年) 第三十条
evidence.quote: 申请设立公司，应当提交设立登记申请书、公司章程等文件，提交的相关材料应当真实、合法和有效。
evidence.note: 公司章程 is among the documents submitted for incorporation registration, held in the enterprise registration file (企业档案).

caveats: 章程 is filed as registration submission material (企业档案), not issued as a public register extract; obtaining a copy requires an archive/档案 request.

documentLabel: Filed articles of association (enterprise archive copy)
documentLocal: 公司章程（企业档案 / 登记提交材料）
summary: Every company must adopt articles of association (公司章程) under Company Law Art. 5, and the 章程 is submitted at registration and held in the enterprise archive (企业档案) of the AMR. It is not part of the standard register extract nor published on GSXT, so it must be obtained as a separate archive document (企业档案查询). Hence it is provable from the registry, but only as an additional document.

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023年) 第四十五条
evidence.quote: 设立有限责任公司，应当由股东共同制定公司章程。
evidence.note: A limited liability company must have articles of association (公司章程) drawn up by its shareholders — i.e. the 章程 exists as a mandatory constitutional document.

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023年) 第三十条
evidence.quote: 申请设立公司，应当提交设立登记申请书、公司章程等文件，提交的相关材料应当真实、合法和有效。
evidence.note: 公司章程 is expressly among the documents submitted for incorporation registration, so it sits in the company's registration/enterprise file (企业档案) rather than being issued as a standalone public extract.

caveats: 章程 is filed as registration submission material (企业档案), not issued as a public register extract; obtaining a copy requires an archive/档案 request.

documentLabel: Certified enterprise register extract / registration archive particulars
documentLocal: 企业登记档案（登记信息 / 国家企业信用信息公示系统登记资料）
summary: Identical registration regime to the LLC: the SAMR / local AMR maintains the enterprise register and publishes current particulars via GSXT. A certified register extract / machine-read archive copy is the base document evidencing the joint-stock company's registered particulars (name, capital, legal representative, business scope, promoters). This is the German Registerauszug equivalent.

evidence.basis: 市场主体登记管理条例 第八条
evidence.quote: 市场主体的一般登记事项包括：（一）名称；（二）主体类型；（三）经营范围；（四）住所或者主要经营场所；（五）注册资本或者出资额；（六）法定代表人、执行事务合伙人或者负责人姓名。
evidence.note: Same general registration items apply to the joint-stock company.
evidence.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/中华人民共和国市场主体登记管理条例

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023) 第三十二条
evidence.quote: 通过国家企业信用信息公示系统向社会公示
evidence.note: Registration items publicized via GSXT.

caveats: Wikisource mirror used for verbatim wording; government-site direct fetch blocked (SSL/404).
GSXT online display is structured data; the DOCUMENT proof is the certified extract / 企业机读档案登记资料 from the AMR.

documentLabel: Certified enterprise register extract / registration archive particulars
documentLocal: 企业登记档案（登记信息 / 国家企业信用信息公示系统登记资料）
summary: The enterprise register is maintained by the market-regulation authority (SAMR / local AMR) and current registered particulars are published via GSXT. A certified register extract / machine-read archive copy of the registration record is the base document evidencing name, domicile, registered capital, legal representative and business scope. This directly corresponds to the German Registerauszug.

evidence.basis: 市场主体登记管理条例 (Market Entities Registration Regulation) 第八条
evidence.quote: 市场主体的一般登记事项包括：（一）名称；（二）主体类型；（三）经营范围；（四）住所或者主要经营场所；（五）注册资本或者出资额；（六）法定代表人、执行事务合伙人或者负责人姓名。
evidence.note: Defines the general registration items that constitute the register extract.
evidence.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/中华人民共和国市场主体登记管理条例

evidence.basis: 中华人民共和国公司法 (2023) 第三十二条
evidence.quote: 通过国家企业信用信息公示系统向社会公示
evidence.note: Registration items are publicized via GSXT (quote is a verbatim fragment of the article; surrounding text confirms 公司登记事项 are publicized).

caveats: Wikisource is a mirror of the official statute; article wording verified against it but not re-fetched from gov.cn (SSL/404 blocked direct government-site fetches).
The publicly downloadable GSXT record is a data display; the DOCUMENT proof is the certified register extract / 企业机读档案登记资料 obtained from the AMR.

summary: For a Sociedad Anónima the accionistas are recorded in the company-held libro de registro de acciones (libro de accionistas); share transfers are entered in that company book, not in the Registro Mercantil. The Cámara de Comercio's Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal does not certify the current shareholder composition. No registry-issued document evidences the S.A.'s shareholder list.

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio (libro de registro de acciones; registro de la transferencia de acciones en el libro de la sociedad)
evidence.note: Share ownership and transfers of a S.A. are entered in the company's share-register book, held by the company, not at the Cámara de Comercio. Verbatim article text not fetched (gov.co sources unreachable).

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: verbatim Código de Comercio text (share-register and transfer articles) not fetched; conclusion rests on the settled rule that the libro de registro de acciones is company-held and not part of the Registro Mercantil.

summary: For an S.A.S. the shareholders are recorded in the company-held libro de registro de accionistas, not in the Registro Mercantil. The Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal does not certify the current shareholder composition; only the constituting shareholders are named in the documento de constitución, which does not reflect later share transfers. There is therefore no registry-issued document that evidences the current shareholder list.

evidence.basis: Ley 1258 de 2008 (S.A.S.), with remisión to the Sociedad Anónima share-register rules of the Código de Comercio
evidence.note: Share ownership and transfers of an S.A.S. are entered in the company's libro de registro de accionistas, held by the company; the Cámara de Comercio does not register current shareholders. Verbatim article text could not be fetched (gov.co sources unreachable).

evidence.basis: Wikipedia (ES), 'Sociedad por acciones simplificada' — corroborating framework
evidence.note: Confirms the S.A.S. is constituted by documento privado registered at 'el registro de la cámara de comercio del lugar del domicilio principal de la sociedad' per Ley 1258 art. 5; does not indicate ongoing shareholder registration at the Cámara.

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: verbatim statutory text not fetched; conclusion rests on the settled Colombian rule that the libro de registro de accionistas is company-held.

For a single-shareholder (unipersonal) S.A.S., the sole constituting shareholder may appear in the documento de constitución (and sometimes on the certificate), but this is a snapshot of founders, not a current, transfer-updated shareholder list.

documentLocal: Escritura pública de constitución / Estatutos (inscrita en el Registro Mercantil)
summary: A Sociedad Anónima is constituted by escritura pública (Código de Comercio, art. 110), which is inscribed in the Registro Mercantil of the Cámara de Comercio. The registered escritura de constitución / estatutos is a distinct document, obtainable as a certified copy from the Cámara de Comercio (and from the notaría), in addition to the base register extract. That registered document proves the constitution.

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio, art. 110 (contenido de la escritura de constitución) and Registro Mercantil inscription rules
evidence.note: The escritura pública de constitución is registered in the Cámara de Comercio and retrievable as a certified copy. Verbatim text not fetched (gov.co sources unreachable).

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: verbatim art. 110 text not fetched.

Classified as proved_by_additional_document because the constitution is a document distinct from the base register extract; certified copies are issued by the Cámara de Comercio and/or the originating notaría.

documentLocal: Documento de constitución / Estatutos (inscrito en el Registro Mercantil)
summary: An S.A.S. is constituted by documento privado (or escritura pública where an in-kind contribution or other legal requirement demands it), which must be inscribed in the Registro Mercantil of the Cámara de Comercio under Ley 1258 de 2008 art. 5. The registered constitution/estatutos are a distinct document, obtainable as a certified copy from the Cámara de Comercio in addition to the base register extract. That registered document proves the constitution.

evidence.basis: Ley 1258 de 2008, art. 5 (contenido del documento de constitución; inscripción en el Registro Mercantil)
evidence.note: The constitution document is inscribed in the Cámara de Comercio and can be retrieved as a certified copy. Verbatim text not fetched (gov.co sources unreachable).

evidence.basis: Wikipedia (ES), 'Sociedad por acciones simplificada'
evidence.note: Corroborates: S.A.S. 'se constituye por documento privado' and is registered at the cámara de comercio del domicilio principal (Ley 1258 art. 5).

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: verbatim art. 5 text not fetched.

Because the constitution is a document distinct from the base register extract (Certificado de Existencia), it is classified as proved_by_additional_document; the Cámara de Comercio issues certified copies of registered documents.

documentLabel: Certificate of Existence and Legal Representation
documentLocal: Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal
summary: As for all commercial companies, the Sociedad Anónima's register extract is the Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal issued by the Cámara de Comercio from the Registro Mercantil. It is an issued document certifying existence, domicile, capital, objeto and legal representation, and is the direct equivalent of the German Registerauszug. It is obtained directly from the registry as the company's base document.

evidence.basis: Código de Comercio (Registro Mercantil) / Cámara de Comercio
evidence.note: Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal is the standard register extract for a Sociedad Anónima; verbatim text not fetched (gov.co sources unreachable).

caveats: Verbatim registry/statutory text could not be fetched from primary sources; base-document status rests on the established role of the Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal.

documentLabel: Certificate of Existence and Legal Representation
documentLocal: Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal
summary: The Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal, issued by the Cámara de Comercio from the Registro Mercantil, is Colombia's register extract and is the direct functional equivalent of the German Registerauszug. It is an issued document (not merely parsed data) that certifies the S.A.S.'s existence, domicile, capital, objeto and legal representatives. It is obtained directly from the registry as the base document for the company.

evidence.basis: Cámara de Comercio / Registro Mercantil (Código de Comercio, Ley 1258 de 2008 art. 5)
evidence.note: Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal is the standard register extract issued by every Cámara de Comercio; verbatim text of the statute could not be fetched (gov.co sources unreachable).

caveats: Verbatim statutory/registry text could not be fetched from primary sources in this environment; the base-document status rests on the well-established role of the Certificado de Existencia y Representación Legal.

documentLocal: Certificate of Shareholders/members (certified) / Annual Return HE32
summary: The Registrar issues a certified Certificate of Shareholders/members showing name and address of each member, share class/value and number of shares. The Annual Return (Form HE32), filed on the public register, also lists the members/shareholders. Both are official obtainable documents evidencing the REGISTERED (legal) shareholders.

evidence.basis: DRCIP companies.gov.cy — Obtaining Certified Copies/Certificates (overview)
evidence.quote: Certificate of Shareholders/members
evidence.note: Listed among certificates the Registrar issues; outlines shareholder name/address, share class (value) and number of shares.

evidence.basis: Companies Law Cap. 113 — annual return provisions (Form HE32); DRCIP
evidence.note: Every company must file an annual return (Form HE32) on the public register giving details of shareholders, directors, secretary, registered office and share capital, with audited financial statements.

caveats: CRITICAL nominee/beneficial distinction: the Certificate of Shareholders and the HE32 show only the REGISTERED (legal) shareholders. Cyprus widely uses nominee shareholders holding under declarations of trust; the registered member may be a nominee, not the beneficial owner.
Beneficial owners are held in the separate UBO Register, NOT publicly accessible — only competent authorities and AML-obliged entities; not obtainable as an open registry document.
Annual-return STALENESS: HE32 is a periodic snapshot (filed ~annually after the AGM) and may not reflect intra-year share transfers.

documentLocal: Certificate of Shareholders/members (certified) / Annual Return HE32
summary: As for private companies, the Registrar issues a certified Certificate of Shareholders/members and the public Annual Return (HE32) lists members, both evidencing the registered (legal) shareholders of a public company under Cap. 113.

evidence.basis: Cyprus Registrar of Companies — official list of certified certificates issued
evidence.quote: Certificate of Shareholders/members
evidence.note: The Registrar issues a certified Certificate of Shareholders/members, directly evidencing the member list held on the register (HE32 annual return data).

caveats: For a listed/public company the register may lag beneficial ownership held via nominees.

documentLocal: Memorandum and Articles of Association (certified copy)
summary: The company's constitution is the Memorandum and Articles of Association, filed with the Registrar on incorporation. The DRCIP issues a certified copy of the Memorandum and Articles of Association as an official document (by hand/post; not among the online e-filing self-service set).

evidence.basis: DRCIP companies.gov.cy — Obtaining Certified Copies/Certificates (overview)
evidence.quote: Memorandum and Articles of Association
evidence.note: Listed among the certified copies the Registrar issues.

caveats: UNVERIFIED: certified M&A copy appears obtainable by hand/post rather than via the online e-filing self-service list; delivery channel not fully confirmed from primary text.
A certified copy reflects the constitution as amended up to its date of issue.

documentLocal: Memorandum and Articles of Association (certified copy)
summary: A public company's constitution is likewise its Memorandum and Articles of Association, filed with the Registrar and obtainable as a certified copy from the DRCIP.

evidence.basis: Cyprus Registrar of Companies — official list of certified copies issued
evidence.quote: Memorandum and Articles of Association
evidence.note: The Registrar issues a certified copy of the Memorandum and Articles of Association as a base register document.

caveats: INFERENCE: public-company treatment assumed identical to private per the single DRCIP certified-copy list.
Certified copy reflects the constitution as amended up to its date of issue.

documentLocal: Certified certificates issued by the Registrar (Registered Office; Directors and secretary; Good Standing; Capital)
summary: Cyprus has no single consolidated register extract. The DRCIP instead issues discrete certified certificates that together evidence the current registered structure (registered office, directors/secretary, capital, good standing). Each is an official document obtainable via e-filing or by hand/post, reflecting the company structure as notified to the register up to its date of issue.

evidence.basis: DRCIP companies.gov.cy — Obtaining Certified Copies/Certificates (overview)
evidence.quote: Certificate of Registered Office Address, Certificate of Directors and secretary, Certificate of Shareholders/members, Certificate of Capital, Certificate of Good Standing
evidence.note: Full enumerated list of certificates the Registrar issues.

evidence.basis: DRCIP companies.gov.cy — Obtaining Certified Copies/Certificates (overview)
evidence.quote: the certified copy/certificate shall reflect the structure of the company on the basis of what has been notified to the companies register up to its date of issue
evidence.note: Governs currency/staleness of every certificate.

caveats: INFERENCE: no single German-style 'extract' exists in CY; the base document is a bundle of separate certified certificates, so which certificate satisfies REGISTERAUSZUG depends on the KYC data point required.
The certificate reflects only what has been NOTIFIED to the register up to its issue date (potential staleness).

documentLocal: Certified certificates issued by the Registrar (Registered Office; Directors and secretary; Good Standing; Capital)
summary: Same DRCIP regime applies to public companies: no single consolidated extract, but discrete certified certificates (registered office, directors/secretary, capital, good standing) that together evidence the current registered structure, obtainable via e-filing or hand/post and reflecting what was notified to the register up to the issue date.

evidence.basis: Cyprus Registrar of Companies — official list of certified certificates issued
evidence.quote: Certificate of Good Standing
evidence.note: Registrar-issued certificate confirming the company's registered status.

evidence.basis: Cyprus Registrar of Companies — official list of certified certificates issued
evidence.quote: Certificate of Registered Office Address
evidence.note: Registrar-issued certificate of the registered particulars; alongside 'Certificate of Directors and secretary' and 'Certificate of Capital' these together constitute the registry extract set.

caveats: Cyprus issues discrete per-item certificates (office, directors/secretary, capital, good standing) rather than a single consolidated extract.

summary: For an a.s., shareholders (akcionáři) are GENERALLY NOT public: § 48 of zákon 304/2013 does not enter the shareholders of an a.s. into the obchodní rejstřík, and no shareholder list is filed in the sbírka listin. IMPORTANT EXCEPTION: where the a.s. has a single shareholder, that jediný akcionář IS entered under §48 and appears on the výpis. Beyond that, ownership is tracked outside the register (seznam akcionářů kept by the company, or the central depository for book-entry shares).

evidence.basis: zákon č. 304/2013 Sb., § 48 — sole-shareholder a.s. entry (the only shareholder fact the register carries)
evidence.quote: má-li společnost jediného akcionáře, zapisuje se i jméno a sídlo nebo adresa místa pobytu, popřípadě také bydliště, liší-li se od adresy místa pobytu, tohoto akcionáře
evidence.note: Narrow exception; for a multi-shareholder a.s. no shareholders are registered.

caveats: EXCEPTION: a sole-shareholder a.s. — its jediný akcionář is on the výpis (§48). Overall status set to not_provable_from_registry because the GENERAL a.s. case has no registry proof of shareholders.
Shareholders of a normal a.s. are recorded in the company-kept seznam akcionářů (registered shares) or the central securities depository (book-entry shares) — neither is part of the public register.

summary: KEY FACT CONFIRMED FROM STATUTE: for an s.r.o. the společníci (members) and the výše podílu of each member are entered directly into the obchodní rejstřík under § 48 of zákon 304/2013 and therefore appear on the výpis itself. No separate 'Gesellschafterliste' document exists in the Czech register: the internal seznam společníků under § 139 ZOK is kept by the company, not filed in the public register. Thus the current-members proof is the base register extract.

evidence.basis: zákon č. 304/2013 Sb., § 48 (skutečnosti zapisované do obchodního rejstříku u s.r.o.)
evidence.quote: u společnosti s ručením omezeným jméno a sídlo nebo adresa místa pobytu, popřípadě také bydliště, liší-li se od adresy místa pobytu, jejích společníků, výše podílu každého společníka
evidence.note: Members and their share amounts are register-entered facts and appear on the výpis.

evidence.basis: zákon č. 90/2012 Sb. (ZOK), § 139 — seznam společníků
evidence.note: The seznam společníků is maintained internally BY THE COMPANY and is not a public-register document; the register-side proof of members is the výpis under §48 of 304/2013.

caveats: The výpis reflects the state as registered; there can be a lag between an actual transfer and its registration — the výpis proves the REGISTERED members.
INFERENCE: the same logic extends to partnerships (v.o.s., k.s.) whose společníci are likewise register-entered under §48; not separately verified verbatim.

summary: The a.s. constitution — the stanovy (articles/statutes), which for an a.s. also serve as the zakladatelské právní jednání — is filed in the sbírka listin of the obchodní rejstřík under § 66 of zákon 304/2013, together with its current full wording after amendments. It is a separate downloadable document, not part of the výpis.

evidence.basis: zákon č. 304/2013 Sb., § 66 písm. a) — sbírka listin
evidence.quote: zakladatelské právní jednání právnické osoby, statut nadace
evidence.note: For an a.s. the stanovy are the zakladatelské právní jednání deposited in the sbírka listin; §66 also requires the current full wording after each amendment.

caveats: A very recent amendment of the stanovy may not yet be deposited in the sbírka listin, so the latest filed version can lag the actual current articles.

documentLocal: společenská smlouva (u jednočlenné s.r.o. zakladatelská listina)
summary: The constitution — společenská smlouva, or zakladatelská listina for a single-member s.r.o. — is filed in the sbírka listin (collection of documents) of the obchodní rejstřík as the company's zakladatelské právní jednání under § 66 of zákon 304/2013, plus its full current wording after any amendment. It is a separate downloadable document, not part of the výpis.

evidence.basis: zákon č. 304/2013 Sb., § 66 písm. a) — sbírka listin
evidence.quote: zakladatelské právní jednání právnické osoby, statut nadace
evidence.note: The s.r.o.'s společenská smlouva / zakladatelská listina is the zakladatelské právní jednání filed in the sbírka listin; §66 also requires the current full wording after amendments.

caveats: The sbírka listin holds what the company has filed; a very recent amendment may not yet be deposited, so the latest version on file may lag the actual current constitution.

summary: The current register extract (výpis z obchodního rejstříku) is the base document for an a.s., issued by the court-run obchodní rejstřík under zákon 304/2013 and available in official verified form via justice.cz.

evidence.basis: zákon č. 304/2013 Sb., o veřejných rejstřících — official register; extract = výpis
evidence.note: The výpis is the official extract of currently entered facts for the a.s.

summary: The current register extract (výpis z obchodního rejstříku) is the base document issued by the obchodní rejstřík operated by the courts under zákon 304/2013. It is the standard evidence of the company's currently registered facts and is downloadable in an official (verified) form via justice.cz.

evidence.basis: zákon č. 304/2013 Sb., o veřejných rejstřících — official register run under this Act; extract = výpis
evidence.note: The obchodní rejstřík is one of the veřejné rejstříky governed by 304/2013; the výpis is the official extract of currently entered facts.

summary: Same limitation, WORSE for A/S than for ApS. The public Ejerregister again publishes only owners >=5% of capital or votes (Selskabsloven §58 stk.1 -> §55 stk.1); sub-5% shareholders are invisible and it is register data, not a filed shareholder-list document. The ejerbog (§50) is company-kept and, for an A/S, is accessible only to public authorities — NOT even to individual shareholders, unlike an ApS. It is not filed with Erhvervsstyrelsen. Consequently no full current shareholder-list document is obtainable from the registry. Additionally, aktier can be bearer/centrally-registered, further weakening any registry-based ownership picture.

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §55 stk.1 (notification threshold)
evidence.quote: mindst 5 pct. af selskabskapitalens stemmerettigheder eller ... 5 pct. af selskabskapitalen

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §58 stk.1 og stk.3 (public Ejerregister)
evidence.quote: foretages registrering af de af selskabets kapitalejere, som besidder betydelige kapitalandele, jf. § 55, stk. 1
evidence.note: stk.3: 'Oplysninger modtaget i henhold til stk. 1 og 2 offentliggøres i Erhvervsstyrelsens it-system.'

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §51 (access to ejerbog)
evidence.quote: Ejerbogen skal være tilgængelig for offentlige myndigheder.
evidence.note: For an A/S the ejerbog is NOT made accessible to individual shareholders (that applies to anpartshavere in an ApS); it is not filed with CVR.

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §52 stk.3 (bearer/centrally-registered shares)
evidence.note: A/S with ihændehaverbeviser or shares in en værdipapircentral are exempted from parts of the owner-book content rules, further limiting registry ownership visibility.

caveats: UNVERIFIED as a complete shareholder proof: public Ejerregister shows ONLY owners >=5% — treat like a PSC-register limitation; sub-5% holders invisible.
The public Ejerregister is register/parsed data, not a filed shareholder-list document.
For A/S the full ejerbog is even less accessible than for ApS (public authorities only) and is not filed with the registry.
Bearer / centrally-registered shares can make the true shareholder set indeterminate from any register.

summary: Denmark has two ownership records, and NEITHER yields a full current shareholder-list document from the registry. (1) The public Ejerregister on CVR/Virk publishes only owners holding >=5% of capital OR voting rights (Selskabsloven §58 stk.1 -> §55 stk.1). Owners below 5% are invisible, and it is a register data view, not a filed shareholder-list document — a PSC-register-style threshold limitation. (2) The ejerbog (owner book), which lists ALL kapitalejere, is created and kept by the company (§50), not filed with Erhvervsstyrelsen; for an ApS it is accessible to public authorities and to every anpartshaver (§51) but NOT to a third party such as a KYC requester. Therefore no full current shareholder-list document is provable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §55 stk.1 (notification threshold for legale ejere)
evidence.quote: mindst 5 pct. af selskabskapitalens stemmerettigheder eller ... 5 pct. af selskabskapitalen
evidence.note: Owner must notify company only at/above 5% of votes or capital; sub-5% owners never enter the public register.

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §58 stk.1 and stk.3 (public Ejerregister content and publication)
evidence.quote: foretages registrering af de af selskabets kapitalejere, som besidder betydelige kapitalandele, jf. § 55, stk. 1
evidence.note: stk.3: 'Oplysninger modtaget i henhold til stk. 1 og 2 offentliggøres i Erhvervsstyrelsens it-system.' Public register limited to >=5% ('betydelige kapitalandele').

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §50 stk.1 (company must create owner book)
evidence.quote: Det centrale ledelsesorgan skal hurtigst muligt efter selskabets etablering oprette en fortegnelse over samtlige kapitalejere
evidence.note: The full list of ALL owners lives in the company-kept ejerbog, not in the registry.

evidence.basis: Selskabsloven §51 (access to the ejerbog)
evidence.quote: Ejerbogen skal være tilgængelig for offentlige myndigheder.
evidence.note: For ApS the ejerbog is additionally accessible to every anpartshaver, but not to arbitrary third parties/KYC requesters and it is not filed with CVR.

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Legale ejere, ejerbog og ihændehaverregisteret
evidence.note: Official guidance on legale ejere (>=5%) and the ejerbog; page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch but is authoritative and corroborates the statute.

caveats: UNVERIFIED as a complete shareholder proof: the public Ejerregister shows ONLY owners >=5% (capital or votes) — sub-5% owners are invisible, so it is NOT a full Gesellschafterliste; treat like a PSC-register limitation.
The public Ejerregister is register/parsed data (a CVR view), not a filed shareholder-list document.
The ejerbog is the only full owner list but is company-held, not filed with Erhvervsstyrelsen; a KYC third party cannot obtain it from the registry.

summary: An A/S must have vedtægter and a stiftelsesdokument filed with Erhvervsstyrelsen at registration, with updated vedtægter filed on amendment. The current vedtægter are obtainable as a separate filed document from CVR (distinct from the register extract).

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Stiftelse af ApS og A/S
evidence.note: A/S must have stiftelsesdokument and vedtægter submitted to Erhvervsstyrelsen (min. kapital 400.000 kr.).

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Hent oplysninger fra CVR
evidence.note: Copies of vedtægter / stiftelsesdokument orderable from CVR.

caveats: Confirm the retrieved version is the current consolidated vedtægter, not only the original founding document.
IVS (iværksætterselskab) was abolished in 2019 (transition ended ~2021, converting to ApS); residual IVS should no longer appear as an active legal form.

summary: An ApS must have vedtægter (articles) and a stiftelsesdokument (founding document); both are filed with Erhvervsstyrelsen at registration and updated vedtægter must be filed on amendment. The current vedtægter are obtainable as a separate filed document from CVR (a distinct document, not the register extract itself).

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Stiftelse af ApS og A/S
evidence.note: Confirms an ApS must have a stiftelsesdokument and vedtægter submitted to Erhvervsstyrelsen at registration.

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Hent oplysninger fra CVR / Bestil dokumenter
evidence.note: Copies of a company's vedtægter and stiftelsesdokument can be ordered/downloaded from CVR.

caveats: Confirm the retrieved vedtægter are the CURRENT consolidated version (senest ændrede vedtægter), not only the original stiftelsesdokument.

summary: As for the ApS, CVR/Virk (Erhvervsstyrelsen) issues a current, publicly available register extract for an A/S (sammenskrevet resumé / company report / CVR extract) that serves as the base register-extract document.

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Hent oplysninger fra CVR
evidence.note: Official CVR page: company extracts and documents publicly obtainable, same regime for A/S and ApS.

evidence.basis: CVR / Virk — Bestil dokumenter

caveats: As with ApS, verify the provider returns a fixed dated document rather than only a live CVR view.

summary: The Central Business Register (CVR/Virk), maintained by Erhvervsstyrelsen, issues a current register extract for an ApS (sammenskrevet resumé / company report / CVR extract). It is publicly available and downloadable and serves as the base register-extract document.

evidence.basis: Erhvervsstyrelsen — Hent oplysninger fra CVR
evidence.note: Official CVR/Erhvervsstyrelsen page confirming company extracts (sammenskrevet resumé / CVR-udskrift) and documents are publicly obtainable from CVR.

evidence.basis: CVR / Virk — Bestil dokumenter
evidence.note: Views replacing tegningsudskrift, sammenskrevet resumé and fuldstændig udskrift are free; extracts and accounts obtainable via datacvr.virk.dk.

caveats: Modern CVR delivers the extract partly as a live 'view' rather than a static stamped PDF; for KYC confirm your provider returns a fixed, dated document, not just a screen view.

summary: The shareholders of an Estonian AS are not held in the commercial register. The share register (aktsiaraamat) of a public limited company is maintained in the Estonian register of securities operated by Nasdaq CSD (the former EVK); registration of AS shares in that securities register is mandatory. The commercial register / e-Business Register therefore cannot evidence the AS shareholders — that data sits in a separate securities register, access to which is restricted and not obtained as an ordinary open register extract.

evidence.basis: Äriseadustik (Commercial Code) §233 — share register of a public limited company maintained by the Estonian register of securities
evidence.note: Verbatim not extracted (JS-rendered source). §§233-234 place the AS aktsiaraamat with the register of securities.

evidence.basis: Nasdaq CSD (Estonian register of securities / former Eesti Väärtpaberikeskus)
evidence.note: Nasdaq CSD maintains the Estonian securities register in which AS shares are registered; issuer-services pages returned 404 on fetch, cited at domain level.

caveats: Not provable from the COMMERCIAL register; the authoritative source is the securities register (Nasdaq CSD), which is not the Äriregister and not an open extract.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED verbatim: §233 wording not fetched; Nasdaq CSD issuer page not fetched (404).

documentLabel: List of shareholders (register-maintained) / shown on register card
summary: For an OÜ the shareholders (osanikud) are part of the commercial register itself: since the reform in force from 1 February 2023 the registrar — not the management board — maintains the OÜ list of shareholders, and the shareholders appear on the register card. A dedicated list of shareholders (osanike nimekiri) is therefore obtainable directly from the register. The one exception is where the OÜ's shares are registered with the Estonian register of securities (Nasdaq CSD/EVK) or another depository, in which case that securities register — not the commercial register — is authoritative for shareholders.

evidence.basis: Äriseadustik (Commercial Code) §182 — list of shareholders of a private limited company (amended, in force 01.02.2023)
evidence.note: Verbatim not extracted (JS-rendered source). §182 was amended so the registrar keeps the OÜ shareholder list unless the shares are entered in the register of securities.

evidence.basis: e-Business Register (Äriregister)
evidence.note: Shareholders visible on the register card / list of shareholders retrievable for an OÜ.

caveats: EXCEPTION: if the OÜ's shares are registered with the Estonian register of securities (Nasdaq CSD/EVK) or another securities depository, shareholders are NOT in the commercial register; for such an OÜ this becomes not_provable_from_registry (commercial register) and shifts to the securities register.

The 2023 reform moved list-keeping from the management board to the registrar; pre-2023 the register card did not itself list OÜ shareholders. Classified here as base because it is now a register-held record.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED verbatim: §182 wording not fetched.

summary: An AS's articles of association (põhikiri) are submitted to the commercial register on formation and amendment and are part of the public register file. They are a distinct filed document obtainable from the register in addition to the standard register extract, so the constitution is provable by an additional register document.

evidence.basis: Äriseadustik (Commercial Code) §244 — articles of association of a public limited company
evidence.note: Verbatim not extracted (JS-rendered source). §244 governs required content of the AS põhikiri filed with the register.

evidence.basis: e-Business Register (Äriregister) — company documents / register file
evidence.note: Põhikiri retrievable from the company's register file.

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED verbatim: §244 wording not fetched.

summary: An OÜ's articles of association (põhikiri) are submitted to the commercial register on formation and on amendment and form part of the public register file. They are a distinct filed document, obtainable from the register in addition to the standard extract, not part of the base register card. This makes the constitution provable by an additional register document.

evidence.basis: Äriseadustik (Commercial Code) §139 — articles of association of a private limited company
evidence.note: Verbatim not extracted (JS-rendered source). §139 governs the required content of the OÜ põhikiri filed with the register.

evidence.basis: e-Business Register (Äriregister) — company documents / register file
evidence.note: Põhikiri retrievable from the company's register file.

caveats: An OÜ formed via the expedited online procedure may adopt a standard (template) põhikiri; a filed articles document still exists in the register file.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED verbatim: §139 wording not fetched.

summary: Every AS is entered in the commercial register and its register card is the base extract, openly available through the e-Business Register. It shows name, registry code, address, share capital, management and supervisory board members. It does not list the individual shareholders (those are in the securities register). The extract itself is the canonical register document.

evidence.basis: Äriseadustik (Commercial Code) register-entry provisions; e-Business Register
evidence.note: Verbatim not extracted (JS-rendered source).

evidence.basis: e-Business Register (Äriregister)
evidence.note: Register card / extract retrievable per company.

caveats: The AS register card lists directors/organs but not shareholders.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED verbatim: statute text not fetched.

summary: Every OÜ is entered in the Estonian commercial register (Äriregister) held by the Tartu County Court registration department, and its register card is the base extract. It is openly available through the e-Business Register (ariregister.rik.ee). It states name, registry code, address, capital, board members and — since the 1 Feb 2023 reform — the shareholders. This is the canonical register extract.

evidence.basis: Äriseadustik (Commercial Code) §22 et seq. (register entries) and the e-Business Register
evidence.note: Verbatim not extracted: Riigi Teataja English consolidated text is JavaScript-rendered and returned only a loading shell; verify §§22-33 for register content.

evidence.basis: e-Business Register (Äriregister), Centre of Registers and Information Systems (RIK)
evidence.note: Register card / extract retrievable per company at ariregister.rik.ee.

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED verbatim: no statute text could be fetched (JS-rendered Riigi Teataja; web-search budget exhausted). Section mapping is from established knowledge of the Äriseadustik, not a fetched quote.
Extract is available in multiple detail levels (current data vs. detailed/historical printout); the 'B-card' terminology is the traditional register card.

summary: A CURRENT list of SA shareholders is NOT obtainable from the Registro Mercantil. Registered (nominative) shareholders are recorded only in the company's private Libro registro de acciones nominativas kept by the company; bearer shares (acciones al portador) are even less traceable. Neither is filed at the commercial register.

evidence.basis: Ley de Sociedades de Capital, art. 116 — Libro-registro de acciones nominativas
evidence.quote: Las acciones nominativas figurarán en un libro-registro que llevará la sociedad, en el que se inscribirán las sucesivas transferencias de las acciones, con expresión del nombre, apellidos, razón o denominación social... La sociedad solo reputará accionista a quien se halle inscrito en dicho libro. Cualquier accionista que lo solicite podrá examinar el libro registro de acciones nominativas.
evidence.note: The book is held by the company, not the Registro Mercantil, and inspection is limited to accionistas. Bearer shares are not individually registered anywhere public.

caveats: EXCEPTION — single-member SA (sociedad anónima unipersonal): the sole shareholder's identity MUST be recorded at the Registro Mercantil (art. 13 LSC), so for a unipersonal SA the sole owner IS provable from the register.
PARTIAL ALTERNATIVE — 'Certificación de titularidad real' gives UBOs >25%, not the legal shareholder list.
Listed SAs report significant holdings to the CNMV, but that is a separate securities-regulator channel, not the Registro Mercantil.

summary: A CURRENT list of SL shareholders is NOT obtainable from the Registro Mercantil. Ownership of participaciones is recorded only in the company's private Libro registro de socios, kept and custodied by the administrators; share transfers are documented by notarial deed but are NOT filed at the commercial register. Founders named in the escritura de constitución are on the register historically, but subsequent transfers are not, so the register does not evidence the present cap table.

evidence.basis: Ley de Sociedades de Capital (RDL 1/2010), art. 104 — Libro registro de socios
evidence.quote: La sociedad de responsabilidad limitada llevará un Libro registro de socios, en el que se harán constar la titularidad originaria y las sucesivas transmisiones, voluntarias o forzosas, de las participaciones sociales... La sociedad sólo reputará socio a quien se halle inscrito en dicho libro.

evidence.basis: Ley de Sociedades de Capital, art. 105 — access restricted to socios
evidence.quote: Cualquier socio podrá examinar el Libro registro de socios, cuya llevanza y custodia corresponde al órgano de administración.
evidence.note: The book is private to the company; only socios (not third parties/KYC requesters) may inspect it. It is not held by the Registro Mercantil.

evidence.basis: Ley de Sociedades de Capital, art. 106 — transfers by notarial deed, not registered at RM
evidence.quote: La transmisión de las participaciones sociales, así como la constitución del derecho real de prenda sobre las mismas, deberán constar en documento público.
evidence.note: Transfers require a notarial public document but are NOT inscribed in the Registro Mercantil; they update only the private Libro registro de socios. Hence the register cannot show current ownership.

caveats: EXCEPTION — single-member SL (sociedad unipersonal): the identity of the sole shareholder (socio único) MUST be recorded in the Registro Mercantil (art. 13 LSC), so for a unipersonal SL the sole owner IS provable from the register. This does not extend to multi-member companies.

PARTIAL ALTERNATIVE — the Registro Mercantil offers a 'Certificación de titularidad real' (beneficial-ownership certification). This lists UBOs above the 25% threshold, NOT the legal shareholder list, and is not a substitute for a Gesellschafterliste.
The escritura de constitución names the FOUNDING partners (art. 22 LSC), but founders != current shareholders once any transfer has occurred.

documentLabel: Certification of the current articles of association
documentLocal: Certificación de estatutos sociales vigentes (o copia de la escritura de constitución)
summary: The estatutos of an SA are registered at the Registro Mercantil and obtainable as a 'Certificación de estatutos sociales' certifying their literal current content; the escritura de constitución containing them is registered per arts. 20-23 LSC. Not carried in the base extract.

evidence.basis: Registro Mercantil — official product 'Certificación de estatutos sociales'
evidence.quote: Certifica el contenido literal de los estatutos sociales vigentes

evidence.basis: Ley de Sociedades de Capital, art. 20 — constitution by public deed registered at RM
evidence.quote: La constitución de las sociedades de capital exigirá escritura pública, que deberá inscribirse en el Registro Mercantil.

caveats: 'Additional' because the base extract does not reproduce full statutory text; a separate Certificación de estatutos (or copy of the escritura) is required. Applies equally to other capital-company forms (e.g. Sociedad Comanditaria por Acciones, SLNE), which follow the same LSC publicity regime — UNVERIFIED for niche forms beyond SL/SA.

documentLabel: Certification of the current articles of association
documentLocal: Certificación de estatutos sociales vigentes (o copia de la escritura de constitución)
summary: The estatutos sociales are filed and registered at the Registro Mercantil and are obtainable as a document, but not from the base extract. A dedicated 'Certificación de estatutos sociales' certifies the literal content of the currently in-force articles; the escritura de constitución that contains them is registered per arts. 20-23 LSC.

evidence.basis: Registro Mercantil — official product 'Certificación de estatutos sociales'
evidence.quote: Certifica el contenido literal de los estatutos sociales vigentes

evidence.basis: Ley de Sociedades de Capital, arts. 20 & 22-23 — constitution requires public deed with estatutos, registered at RM
evidence.quote: La constitución de las sociedades de capital exigirá escritura pública, que deberá inscribirse en el Registro Mercantil.
evidence.note: Art. 22 requires the escritura to include 'los estatutos de la sociedad'; art. 23 lists mandatory statutory content (denominación, objeto, domicilio, capital, órgano de administración).

caveats: Classified 'additional' because the base nota simple/extract does not reproduce the full statutory text; a separate Certificación de estatutos (or a copy of the escritura) is needed for the full document. INFERENCE: exact nota simple field coverage varies by register office.

documentLocal: nota simple informativa / certificación del Registro Mercantil
summary: As for the SL, the Registro Mercantil issues a nota simple or certificación evidencing the registered data of the SA to any requester; the certificación is the authoritative proof.

evidence.basis: Registro Mercantil (Colegio de Registradores) — Publicidad Formal / Certificaciones
evidence.quote: Certificación de vigencia y cargos
evidence.note: Standard certification products (vigencia y cargos, estatutos, etc.) apply to all capital companies including the SA; publicidad formal is via nota simple or certificación.

caveats: Nota simple is informative only; certificación carries public faith.

documentLocal: nota simple informativa / certificación del Registro Mercantil
summary: The Registro Mercantil issues, on request by anyone, a nota simple (informative extract) or a certificación evidencing the registered data of the SL. The certificación is the authoritative proof; the nota simple is informative only.

evidence.basis: Registro Mercantil (Colegio de Registradores) — official Sede electrónica, Publicidad Formal / Certificaciones
evidence.quote: Publicidad de la sociedad: nota simple informativa y certificación
evidence.note: Publicidad formal is obtained via nota simple (informative, no fe pública) or certificación (accredits the literal registry content with fe pública).

caveats: The nota simple is informative and does not accredit the content with public faith; the certificación does. Both draw only from what is registered — registered facts, not the private shareholder book.

summary: Unlike an Oy, the OWNERS of a partnership — its partners (yhtiömiehet) — ARE recorded in the Trade Register and appear ON the register extract itself. So the current-owner analog is proved by the base document (kaupparekisteriote). There is no separate 'shareholder list'; the extract is the proof.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Information contained in the Finnish Trade Register
evidence.quote: Personal details and position (general or silent partner) of partners. Amount of contribution made by silent partners.
evidence.note: Partners are a registered entry, hence shown on the extract.

caveats: Governed by Laki avoimesta yhtiöstä ja kommandiittiyhtiöstä (389/1988); partner changes require a Trade Register notification, so the extract reflects registered partners.

summary: The partners of a Ky — both the general partner(s) (vastuunalainen yhtiömies) and silent partners (äänetön yhtiömies) — are registered in the Trade Register and appear on the extract, including silent partners' contribution amounts. The current-owner analog is therefore proved by the base document (extract).

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Information contained in the Finnish Trade Register
evidence.quote: Personal details and position (general or silent partner) of partners. Amount of contribution made by silent partners.

caveats: Governed by Laki avoimesta yhtiöstä ja kommandiittiyhtiöstä (389/1988); partner changes are notified to the Trade Register.

summary: PRH does NOT register or issue any document evidencing current shareholders of a private Oy. Under Osakeyhtiölaki 3:15 the board keeps the shareholder register (osakasluettelo) at the company; under 3:17 it is open for inspection AT THE COMPANY'S OFFICE and copies are obtainable from the company itself — not from PRH. Founders appear only in the incorporation deed (perustamissopimus) filed at formation, which does not track later share transfers, so it is not proof of current ownership.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 3 luku 15 §
evidence.quote: Hallituksen on pidettävä osakkeista ja niiden omistajista luetteloa (osakasluettelo)
evidence.note: Board — not PRH — keeps the register.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 3 luku 17 §
evidence.quote: Osakasluettelo on pidettävä jokaisen nähtävänä yhtiön pääkonttorissa
evidence.note: Access is at the company's principal office, not the Trade Register.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: you can view basic details of businesses or housing companies free of charge, download electronic Trade Register extracts free of charge or buy other electronic documents
evidence.note: No shareholder register/list among orderable PRH documents.

caveats: UNVERIFIED exact current statutory wording of 3:15/3:17 — Finlex SPA did not render; quotes cross-checked via a laki.ai mirror of Finlex, not the primary HTML.
PRH's beneficial-owner extract records >25% owners, NOT a full current shareholder list — do not treat it as a Gesellschafterliste equivalent.

summary: PRH does not evidence current shareholders of an Oyj either. For a non-listed Oyj the board keeps the osakasluettelo at the company (OYL 3:15/3:17). For a listed Oyj whose shares are in the book-entry system (arvo-osuusjärjestelmä), the shareholder register is maintained by the central securities depository (Euroclear Finland) on the company's behalf — still NOT by PRH. In neither case does the Trade Register issue a shareholder document.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 3 luku (osakasluettelo / arvo-osuusjärjestelmä)
evidence.quote: Hallituksen on pidettävä osakkeista ja niiden omistajista luetteloa (osakasluettelo)
evidence.note: When shares are in the book-entry system the register is kept in that system, not at PRH.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Information contained in the Finnish Trade Register
evidence.quote: Name of the company
evidence.note: Register content listing per company form does not include shareholders of limited companies.

caveats: INFERENCE: Euroclear Finland as the CSD maintaining the book-entry shareholder register is confirmed via secondary Finnish legal sources, not quoted from a primary statute clause.
Listed-company book-entry shareholder data is obtainable from the CSD/company, not PRH.

summary: The partnership's constitution is the partnership agreement (yhtiösopimus). PRH holds it and offers it for order among 'organisation rules' (partnership agreements) via Virre — a separate document from the extract.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)
evidence.note: 'Partnership agreements' = yhtiösopimus, orderable.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts, articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws or rules
evidence.note: Confirms partnership agreements are among the held/orderable documents.

caveats: Separately ordered paid document, not in the base extract.

summary: The Ky's constitution is the partnership agreement (yhtiösopimus), held by PRH and orderable among 'organisation rules' (partnership agreements) via Virre as a separate document.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts, articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws or rules

caveats: Separately ordered paid document, not in the base extract.

summary: The articles of association (yhtiöjärjestys) are filed with PRH and obtainable as a separate 'organisation rules' document via Virre (priced, not part of the free extract). Minimum content is fixed by Osakeyhtiölaki 2:3.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)
evidence.note: Yhtiöjärjestys orderable as a separate paid document.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 2 luku 3 §
evidence.quote: Yhtiöjärjestyksessä on aina mainittava yhtiön: 1) toiminimi; 2) kotipaikkana oleva Suomen kunta; sekä 3) toimiala.

caveats: Separately ordered document (~EUR 35–50), not contained in the base register extract.

summary: As for Oy, the Oyj's articles of association (yhtiöjärjestys) are filed with PRH and orderable as a separate 'organisation rules' document via Virre.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 2 luku 3 §
evidence.quote: Yhtiöjärjestyksessä on aina mainittava yhtiön: 1) toiminimi; 2) kotipaikkana oleva Suomen kunta; sekä 3) toimiala.

caveats: Separately ordered paid document, not in the base extract.

summary: PRH issues a Trade Register extract for a general partnership (avoin yhtiö) with all current register entries.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

summary: PRH issues a Trade Register extract for a limited partnership (kommandiittiyhtiö) with all current register entries.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

summary: PRH issues a Trade Register extract (kaupparekisteriote) for every registered Oy; it contains all current register entries and is downloadable free (electronic) or orderable as a certified/translated extract via the Virre service.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.
evidence.note: English PRH page.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Trade Register extract
evidence.note: Electronic extract free via Virre; certified/translated extracts priced.

summary: Identical to Oy: PRH issues a Trade Register extract covering all current register entries for an Oyj.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

summary: The registry does not evidence who the current shareholders of an SA are. Shares are recorded in the company's private registre des mouvements de titres and comptes d'actionnaires (or with an account-keeping intermediary for admitted securities); these are not filed at the RCS and not public. Transfers do not amend the statuts.

evidence.basis: Code de commerce, art. R228-9 (registre des mouvements de titres — kept by the company)
evidence.quote: le registre mentionne les nom, prénoms et domicile du cédant et du cessionnaire.
evidence.note: Register held by the issuer, not filed at the RCS, not public.

evidence.basis: Registre des bénéficiaires effectifs (RBE) — Code monétaire et financier, art. L561-46
evidence.quote: l'accès aux informations du RBE est restreint (...) aux personnes justifiant d'un intérêt légitime.
evidence.note: RBE records beneficial owners only, and public access has been closed since 31 July 2024 following CJEU 22 Nov 2022.

caveats: Founding shareholders in the initial statuts are not proof of the current shareholders.
RBE is filed but access-restricted and covers only beneficial owners, not the legal shareholder register.

documentLabel: Articles of association naming the members and the allocation of shares (statuts)
summary: France has no standalone filed shareholder list (no equivalent of the German §40 GmbHG Gesellschafterliste). For a SARL, however, the identity of the associés and the allocation of parts sociales must by law appear in the statuts, which are a filed act publicly obtainable via Infogreffe / Data INPI. Because transfers of parts require an amendment of the statuts, the current statuts on file are the registry document that evidences the current members.

evidence.basis: Code de commerce, art. L223-7 (Légifrance)
evidence.quote: La répartition des parts sociales est mentionnée dans les statuts.
