Since Ley 47 de 2013 (as amended by Ley 18 de 2015) bearer share certificates must be immobilized with an authorized custodian — but that custody is PRIVATE, NOT a public Registro Público record (UNVERIFIED here, from knowledge).
A shareholder list can only come from the company/custodian, never from a Registro Público extract.

documentLabel: Members shown in registered constitution + registered quota transfers
documentLocal: Pacto social (identificación de los socios) + cesiones de cuotas inscritas en el Registro Público
summary: UNLIKE the SA: SRL members (socios) ARE a matter of public record. The pacto social must identify each socio and their cuotas, and any transfer of quotas that changes the identity of the partners MUST be inscribed in the Registro Público. Current members are therefore provable from the registry via the registered pacto social plus inscribed quota transfers (cesiones).

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009 (SRL), Art. 5 (contents of the pacto social)
evidence.quote: El pacto social contendrá: 1. La identificación de los otorgantes y de los socios y la indicación de su domicilio.
evidence.note: The pacto social, registered in the Registro Público, must identify the socios.

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009 (SRL), Art. 11 (acts to be registered)
evidence.quote: Deberán inscribirse en el Registro Público: ... 2. Las transferencias de cuotas sociales que producen variación en las personas de los socios.
evidence.note: Transfers of cuotas that change who the socios are must be inscribed in the Registro Público, keeping the registry record of members current.

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009 (SRL), Art. 26 (transfer of participation)
evidence.quote: La cesión deberá inscribirse en el Registro Público.
evidence.note: Confirms cesión of a socio's participation is registrable, so a base register extract evidences the current socios.

caveats: Text from an authorized-provider PDF reproducing Gaceta Oficial 26.202-A; the socios are proved by the registered pacto social plus registered cesiones de cuotas.

documentLocal: Pacto social / escritura pública de constitución (inscrita en el Registro Mercantil)
summary: The SA's constitution — the pacto social, executed as an escritura pública or protocolized document — is registered in the Registro Mercantil (Registro Público) and obtainable from it. It names the initial directors, the dignatarios framework, the resident agent, object, capital and share structure. The registered constitutional document.

evidence.basis: Ley 32 de 1927, Art. 2 (contents of pacto social)
evidence.quote: Las personas que deseen constituir una sociedad anónima suscribirán un pacto social, que deberá contener: 1. Los nombres y domicilios de cada uno de los suscritores del pacto social; ... 4. El monto del capital social y el número y el valor nominal de las acciones ... 9. El número de directores que no serán menos de tres con especificación de sus nombres y direcciones;

evidence.basis: Ley 32 de 1927, Arts. 4 and 5 (form of the pacto social)
evidence.quote: El pacto social podrá hacerse constar por medio de escritura pública, o en otra forma, siempre que sea atestado por un Notario Público... Si el pacto social no estuviera contenido en escritura pública deberá ser protocolizado en una Notaría de la República.
evidence.note: The constitution exists as an escritura pública / protocolized instrument then inscribed (Art. 6).

caveats: Amendments (reformas al pacto social) are separately inscribed; a fully current constitution requires the original escritura plus registered amendments.
The pacto social names DIRECTORS and the resident agent, NOT the shareholders.

documentLocal: Pacto social / escritura pública (o documento privado protocolizado) de constitución, inscrita en el Registro Público
summary: The SRL constitution — the pacto social, executed as an escritura pública or protocolized private document — is inscribed in the Registro Público and obtainable from it. It contains the socios, capital and cuotas, administrators/legal representation and resident agent.

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009, Art. 5 (form and contents of the pacto social)
evidence.quote: La sociedad de responsabilidad limitada se constituirá por documento privado protocolizado o por escritura pública y se inscribirá en el Registro Público. El pacto social contendrá: ... 6. La designación de la persona o las personas que tendrán a su cargo la administración y la representación de la sociedad ... 8. La designación de un agente residente

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009, Art. 11 num. 1 (amendments must be inscribed)
evidence.quote: Deberán inscribirse en el Registro Público: 1. Las modificaciones al pacto social.
evidence.note: A fully current constitution = registered pacto social plus inscribed modifications.

caveats: Optional estatutos may or may not be inscribed, so some internal governance rules may not be in the public register.
Source is SIJUSA's reproduction of Gaceta Oficial 26.202-A; the organojudicial.gob.pa PDF is a scanned image and could not be text-verified.

documentLocal: Certificación del Registro Público / Certificado de persona jurídica
summary: A Panamanian SA is constituted by escritura pública (or protocolized document) and takes effect against third parties only once inscribed in the Registro Mercantil (Registro Público). The Registro Público issues a certification evidencing existence/vigencia and registered data — directors (named in the pacto social, min. 3), dignatarios, resident agent and capital. This certification, plus the inscribed pacto social, is the register-extract document. It does NOT list shareholders.

evidence.basis: Ley 32 de 1927 (Sobre Sociedades Anónimas), Art. 6 — Superintendencia del Mercado de Valores (official text)
evidence.quote: La escritura pública o el documento protocolizado en que conste el pacto social deberá ser presentado para su inscripción en el Registro Mercantil. La constitución de la sociedad no surtirá efectos respecto de terceros sino desde que el respectivo pacto haya sido inscrito.
evidence.note: Registration in the Registro Mercantil is constitutive of effect vs third parties.

evidence.basis: Ley 32 de 1927, Art. 2 num. 9 (contents of the pacto social)
evidence.quote: El número de directores que no serán menos de tres con especificación de sus nombres y direcciones;
evidence.note: Directors ARE public — named in the registered pacto social; dignatarios and resident agent likewise reflected.

evidence.basis: Registro Público de Panamá — official trámite page (Panamá Digital), 'Certificación para Sociedad Anónima'
evidence.quote: Acreditación emitida para dar constancia de que la Sociedad Anónima existe
evidence.note: Confirms the Registro Público issues a certificate attesting the SA's existence.

caveats: The standard certification evidences directors/dignatarios/resident agent/capital, NOT shareholders.
INFERENCE that a certification itemizes current directors/dignatarios: the law makes those data registrable, but the exact fields of any certificate format are not fixed by Ley 32.

documentLocal: Certificación del Registro Público / Certificado de persona jurídica
summary: An SRL is constituted by protocolized private document or escritura pública and inscribed in the Registro Público; it acquires legal personality only upon inscription. The Registro Público certification is the register-extract document, evidencing existence, administrators/legal representation, resident agent and capital.

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009 (Sociedad de Responsabilidad Limitada), Art. 5 — G.O. 26.202-A (SIJUSA)
evidence.quote: La sociedad de responsabilidad limitada se constituirá por documento privado protocolizado o por escritura pública y se inscribirá en el Registro Público.

evidence.basis: Ley 4 de 2009, Art. 6 (legal personality upon inscription)
evidence.quote: Una vez inscrita la sociedad en el Registro Público tendrá personalidad jurídica.
evidence.note: Inscription is constitutive; a certification evidences it and current standing.

caveats: INFERENCE that the Registro Público issues an SRL certification in the same manner as for an SA — the SRL certification trámite was not separately fetched.

summary: An OPC is by definition a corporation with a single stockholder (Sec. 116), and that sole stockholder is named in the OPC's Articles of Incorporation filed with the SEC (Sec. 118). The complete 'shareholder list' is therefore established by the base document itself. Certified copies of the AOA are obtainable from the SEC.

evidence.basis: R.A. 11232 (Revised Corporation Code), Sec. 116
evidence.quote: A One Person Corporation is a corporation with a single stockholder: Provided, That only a natural person, trust, or an estate may form a One Person Corporation.
evidence.note: Membership is inherently a single, identified holder. Re-verified against lawphil.net full text this session.

evidence.quote: A One Person Corporation shall file articles of incorporation in accordance with the requirements under Section 14 of this Code.
evidence.note: The OPC's AOA is filed with the SEC per the Sec. 14 form. Re-verified against lawphil.net full text this session.

evidence.basis: R.A. 11232, Sec. 14 (Form of Articles of Incorporation), Fifth clause
evidence.quote: Fifth: That the names, nationalities, and residence addresses of the incorporators of the corporation are as follows:
evidence.note: The prescribed AOA form names the incorporator(s); for an OPC the incorporator is the single stockholder (Sec. 116: only a natural person, trust, or estate may form an OPC), so the filed AOA identifies the sole stockholder.

evidence.basis: R.A. 11232, Sec. 129 (Reportorial Requirements of an OPC)
evidence.quote: The One Person Corporation shall submit the following within such period as the Commission may prescribe: (a) Annual financial statements audited by an independent certified public accountant ... (c) A disclosure of all self-dealings and related party transactions entered into between the One Person Corporation and the single stockholder; and (d) Other reports as the Commission may require.
evidence.note: The OPC statutory reportorial list contains NO General Information Sheet — the sole-stockholder identity is carried by the AOA (and any SEC-required 'other reports'), not by a statutory GIS.

evidence.basis: R.A. 11232, Sec. 177 (Reportorial Requirements of Corporations) — contrast provision
evidence.quote: every corporation, domestic or foreign, doing business in the Philippines shall submit to the Commission: (a) Annual financial statements audited by an independent certified public accountant ... and (b) A general information sheet.
evidence.note: Ordinary corporations file a statutory GIS under Sec. 177(b); the OPC-specific list in Sec. 129 omits it. Grounds the judgement call that for an OPC the AOA (not a GIS) is the registry document evidencing the single stockholder. Sec. 177 opens 'Except as otherwise provided in this Code or in the rules issued by the Commission' — SEC rules may still impose a GIS on OPCs administratively.

caveats: JUDGEMENT CALL (now grounded in statute): Sec. 129 lists no GIS for OPCs while Sec. 177(b) requires one from ordinary corporations, so the AOA is the statutory registry document naming the single stockholder. However Sec. 177's opening ('Except as otherwise provided ... in the rules issued by the Commission') and Sec. 129(d) ('Other reports as the Commission may require') leave room for the SEC to require an OPC GIS administratively — SEC-practice documents were not verified this session.

The AOA reflects the stockholder at incorporation; a subsequent transfer of the single stockholder's shares is reflected through later SEC filings/amendments (cf. Sec. 131 conversion mechanics issuing amended AOA) rather than the original AOA, so the base document proves the sole-holder structure but not necessarily the current holder without the latest filing.

summary: The stock and transfer book (the true share register) is company-held at the principal office or the stock transfer agent, not at the SEC (Sec. 73), so it is not a registry document. However, every corporation must file a General Information Sheet with the SEC (Sec. 177(b)); the SEC-prescribed GIS form lists the stockholders and their shareholdings, and certified copies are obtainable from the SEC. Shareholders are therefore provable from the registry, but via an additional filed document (the GIS), not from a base extract.

evidence.quote: every corporation, domestic or foreign, doing business in the Philippines shall submit to the Commission: (a) Annual financial statements ... and (b) A general information sheet.
evidence.note: GIS is a mandatory SEC filing

evidence.quote: The stock and transfer book shall be kept in the principal office of the corporation or in the office of its stock transfer agent
evidence.note: STB is company-held, not filed with SEC

evidence.basis: SEC online document request service (SEC Express) — document catalogue
evidence.quote: General Information Sheet
evidence.note: GIS is orderable as an authenticated copy from the SEC

caveats: The statute (Sec. 177) only names 'a general information sheet'; that the GIS enumerates stockholders and their shareholdings comes from the SEC-prescribed GIS form and settled practice (Philippine jurisprudence treats the GIS as evidence of stock ownership), not from the verbatim text of R.A. 11232 — flagged as UNVERIFIED at the statutory-text level.
The GIS is a periodic snapshot (filed annually, updated on changes); it may lag the current stock and transfer book.

summary: For an OPC the constitution is the Articles of Incorporation alone (Sec. 118), filed with the SEC. Unlike a stock corporation, an OPC is expressly not required to submit or file by-laws (Sec. 119), so the constitution is a single base document. Certified copies of the AOA are obtainable from the SEC.

evidence.quote: A One Person Corporation shall file articles of incorporation in accordance with the requirements under Section 14 of this Code. It shall likewise substantially contain the following:
evidence.note: AOA filed with SEC

evidence.quote: The One Person Corporation is not required to submit and file corporate bylaws.
evidence.note: no by-laws component for the OPC constitution

caveats: The German Gesellschaftsvertrag equivalent for an OPC is the AOA only; there is deliberately no By-laws document to obtain (Sec. 119 exemption).

summary: The constitution is the Articles of Incorporation (Sec. 14) plus the By-laws, both of which are filed with the SEC — the by-laws are 'filed with the Commission and attached to the original articles of incorporation' (Sec. 45). Both are base registry documents and certified/authenticated copies are obtainable from the SEC.

evidence.quote: A copy thereof, duly certified by a majority of the directors or trustees and countersigned by the secretary of the corporation, shall be filed with the Commission and attached to the original articles of incorporation.
evidence.note: by-laws filed with SEC

evidence.quote: The articles of incorporation and bylaws of the corporation and all their amendments;
evidence.note: both are corporate records

evidence.basis: SEC online document request service (SEC Express) — document catalogue
evidence.quote: By-laws (Original and Amended)
evidence.note: AOA and By-laws orderable as authenticated copies

caveats: German 'Gesellschaftsvertrag' maps to the two-part Philippine constitution (AOA + By-laws); both must be pulled to fully mirror it.

summary: An OPC is registered with the SEC like any corporation and receives a Certificate of Incorporation on approval (Sec. 18); it carries the 'OPC' suffix in its name (Sec. 120). Certified/authenticated copies of the certificate are obtainable from the SEC as a document. As with stock corporations there is no consolidated register-extract; current particulars sit in subsequent SEC filings.

evidence.quote: the Commission shall issue the certificate of incorporation.
evidence.note: applies suppletorily to OPCs per Sec. 115

evidence.quote: The provisions of this Title shall primarily apply to One Person Corporations. Other provisions of this Code apply suppletory
evidence.note: general incorporation/certificate rules apply suppletorily

caveats: Same mapping caveat as the stock-corporation Registerauszug: SEC Certificate of Incorporation is the base analog, not a German-style consolidated extract.
INFERENCE: equivalence judgement, not a statutory label.

summary: The SEC is the corporate registry; on registration it issues the Certificate of Incorporation, the registry's own act of record evidencing legal existence and registration particulars. Certified/authenticated copies are obtainable from the SEC as a document (not merely parsed data). The Philippines has no single consolidated 'register extract' equivalent to a German Handelsregisterauszug; current particulars beyond the certificate are carried in the annually filed General Information Sheet.

evidence.basis: R.A. 11232 (Revised Corporation Code), Sec. 18
evidence.quote: the Commission shall issue the certificate of incorporation.
evidence.note: SEC = the registry; certificate is the registration act of record

evidence.basis: SEC online document request service (SEC Express)
evidence.quote: SEC documents can now be requested online.  There is no need to go to the SEC to get plain or authenticated copies anymore.
evidence.note: authenticated copies of registry documents obtainable as documents

caveats: No single consolidated register-extract document exists (unlike a German Handelsregisterauszug); the closest base document is the SEC Certificate of Incorporation, with current particulars in the GIS.
INFERENCE: mapping the German 'Registerauszug' onto the SEC Certificate of Incorporation is an equivalence judgement, not a statutory label.

documentLocal: rejestr akcjonariuszy prowadzony przez uprawniony podmiot / notariusza, niejawny; odpis z KRS ujawnia tylko jedynego akcjonariusza
summary: Like the S.A., shareholders of a P.S.A. are NOT public. Shares are dematerialised and recorded in a rejestr akcjonariuszy kept by an authorised entity (brokerage house / bank / KDPW) or a notary (KSH art. 300(31)). The odpis discloses only a sole shareholder and the identity of the entity keeping the register — never the general body of shareholders. The register itself is open only to the company and shareholders. A full shareholder list is therefore not provable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Kodeks spółek handlowych, art. 300(31) (podmioty prowadzące rejestr akcjonariuszy PSA)
evidence.note: Register kept by an entity authorised to keep securities accounts, or a notary — not by the court and not public.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 38 (PSA — sole shareholder note only)
evidence.quote: w przypadku gdy spółka ma tylko jednego akcjonariusza - jego oznaczenie zgodnie z art. 35, a także wzmiankę o tym, że jest on jedynym akcjonariuszem spółki
evidence.note: KRS/odpis notes only a sole akcjonariusz; it does not otherwise list shareholders.

caveats: Full shareholder ownership of a P.S.A. is NOT provable from any public registry document; the rejestr akcjonariuszy is private.
Exception: a single-shareholder P.S.A. is noted on the odpis, so 100% sole ownership can be evidenced there.
INFERENCE: the P.S.A. register's confidentiality mirrors the S.A. regime; precise wording sits in the PSA-specific provisions (art. 300(33)–(36)), confirmed only in part verbatim.

documentLocal: rejestr akcjonariuszy (niejawny); odpis z KRS ujawnia wyłącznie jedynego akcjonariusza
summary: Shareholders of an S.A. are NOT public. The odpis discloses only a sole shareholder (jedyny akcjonariusz), if any. The current shareholder record is the electronic rejestr akcjonariuszy (which since 1 March 2021 replaced the former księga akcyjna), kept by an authorised professional entity (dom maklerski / bank / KDPW / notary). By KSH art. 328(5) that register is open only to the company and each shareholder — it is neither a KRS document nor publicly accessible. Therefore a full shareholder list cannot be proved from the registry.

evidence.basis: Kodeks spółek handlowych, art. 328(5) §1 (jawność rejestru akcjonariuszy)
evidence.quote: Rejestr akcjonariuszy jest jawny dla spółki i każdego akcjonariusza.
evidence.note: Register is open ONLY to the company and shareholders — not to the public and not part of the KRS.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 38 (sole shareholder note only)
evidence.note: The KRS/odpis notes only a jedyny akcjonariusz (sole shareholder); it never lists the general body of shareholders of an S.A.

caveats: Full shareholder ownership of an S.A. is NOT provable from any public registry document. The rejestr akcjonariuszy is private (KSH art. 328(5)).
Exception: a single-shareholder S.A. is noted on the odpis, so 100% sole ownership can be evidenced by the base document in that narrow case.
The former paper księga akcyjna was repealed with dematerialisation effective 1 March 2021.

documentLocal: odpis z KRS (wspólnicy / komplementariusze / komandytariusze wpisani w rejestrze)
summary: Unlike sp. z o.o. and S.A., for personal partnerships ALL partners are entered in the KRS and appear on the odpis. For a spółka komandytowa both general partners (komplementariusze) and limited partners (komandytariusze) are entered, with the komandytariusz's contribution (suma komandytowa). So the current partner set is directly proved by the base extract. (For S.K.A. the komplementariusze are on the odpis, but its akcjonariusze are NOT — those follow the S.A. rejestr-akcjonariuszy regime.)

evidence.basis: Ustawa o Krajowym Rejestrze Sądowym, Art. 38 (contents of the entrepreneurs' register)
evidence.quote: oznaczenie wspólników spółki jawnej, zgodnie z art. 35
evidence.note: Art. 38 requires that the partners (wspólnicy) of a sp. j., and the komplementariusze/komandytariusze of sp. k./S.K.A., be entered in the KRS register itself; the odpis z KRS therefore evidences the partner list.

caveats: Text taken from a secondary site (lexlege) reproducing the statute; applies to partnership forms whose members are registered, not to capital-company shareholders.

documentLocal: lista wspólników (w aktach rejestrowych) — odpis z KRS pokazuje wyłącznie wspólników >=10% oraz jedynego wspólnika
summary: A full current shareholder list IS provable, but NOT from the odpis. The odpis (base document) discloses only shareholders holding, alone or jointly, at least 10% of share capital, plus a note if there is a single (sole) shareholder. The complete current list is the 'lista wspólników' which the management board must file with the registry court after every change (KSH art. 188 §3); it lists every shareholder with number and nominal value of shares and sits in the akta rejestrowe (registration files), which are public and largely viewable online (Przeglądarka akt rejestrowych / RAR) for filings after July 2021.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 38 pkt 8 lit. c (dane o wspólnikach sp. z o.o.)
evidence.quote: oznaczenie wspólników posiadających samodzielnie lub łącznie z innymi co najmniej 10 % kapitału zakładowego oraz ilość posiadanych przez tych wspólników udziałów
evidence.note: Only >=10% holders are entered in the KRS/odpis; holders below 10% are invisible on the extract.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 38 (sole shareholder)
evidence.quote: jeżeli spółka ma tylko jednego wspólnika - wzmiankę, że jest on jedynym wspólnikiem spółki
evidence.note: A sole shareholder is noted on the odpis, so for a single-shareholder sp. z o.o. the base document does prove 100% ownership.

evidence.basis: Kodeks spółek handlowych, art. 188 §3 (lista wspólników składana sądowi rejestrowemu)
evidence.quote: Po każdym wpisaniu zmiany zarząd składa sądowi rejestrowemu podpisaną przez wszystkich członków zarządu nową listę wspólników z wymienieniem liczby i wartości nominalnej udziałów każdego z nich
evidence.note: This filed 'lista wspólników' is the full current shareholder list; it lives in the akta rejestrowe, not on the odpis.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 10 (jawność / udostępnianie akt rejestrowych)
evidence.note: Registration files (including the lista wspólników and umowa spółki) are public; viewable online via Przeglądarka akt rejestrowych / RAR for documents filed after July 2021, otherwise at the registry court.

caveats: CRITICAL: the odpis z KRS is NOT a complete shareholder list. Only holders of >=10% of share capital (alone or jointly) and a sole shareholder appear; dispersed/small holders below 10% are entirely invisible on the extract.
The full current list = 'lista wspólników' filed under KSH art. 188 §3, held in the akta rejestrowe (an additional document, not the base extract).
Online availability of the lista wspólników via RAR generally limited to filings after July 2021; older filings require a request to the registry court.
The 'lista wspólników' is not fully identical in legal function to the German §40-GmbHG Gesellschafterliste; treat it as the closest evidentiary equivalent.

summary: The P.S.A.'s constitution (umowa spółki) is filed with the registry court and forms part of the public akta rejestrowe, viewable online via RAR / Przeglądarka akt rejestrowych for post-July-2021 filings. It is not on the odpis.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 10 (udostępnianie akt rejestrowych)
evidence.note: Any interested person may inspect the umowa spółki in the registration files.

evidence.basis: Repozytorium Akt Rejestrowych (RAR) / Portal Rejestrów Sądowych
evidence.note: Electronic files browsable online by KRS number since July 2021.

caveats: Additional document in the akta rejestrowe, not part of the odpis.
Online availability via RAR generally limited to post-July-2021 filings (P.S.A. exists only from 1 July 2021, so usually satisfied).

summary: The statute (statut) of an S.A. is filed with the registry court and forms part of the public akta rejestrowe, viewable online via Przeglądarka akt rejestrowych / RAR for filings after July 2021, otherwise obtainable at the court. It is not printed on the odpis.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 10 (udostępnianie akt rejestrowych)
evidence.note: Any interested person may inspect documents in the registration files, including the statut.

evidence.basis: Repozytorium Akt Rejestrowych (RAR) / Portal Rejestrów Sądowych
evidence.note: Electronic registration files browsable online by KRS number since July 2021.

caveats: Additional document in the akta rejestrowe, not part of the odpis.
Online availability via RAR generally limited to post-July-2021 filings.
May be original statut plus amendment resolutions rather than a consolidated text.

documentLocal: umowa spółki / statut (w aktach rejestrowych KRS)
summary: The partnership agreement (umowa spółki; statut for S.K.A.) is filed with the registry court in the public akta rejestrowe, viewable online via RAR / Przeglądarka akt rejestrowych for post-July-2021 filings.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 10 (udostępnianie akt rejestrowych)
evidence.note: Any interested person may inspect the umowa spółki in the registration files.

caveats: Additional document in the akta rejestrowe, not on the odpis.
Online availability via RAR generally limited to post-July-2021 filings.

summary: The articles of association (umowa spółki) are not printed on the odpis but are filed with the registry court and form part of the public akta rejestrowe. They are viewable online via Przeglądarka akt rejestrowych / RAR for filings after July 2021, or obtainable from the court for older documents.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 10 (udostępnianie akt rejestrowych)
evidence.note: By virtue of the openness of the register of entrepreneurs, any interested person may inspect documents held in the registration files, e.g. the umowa spółki.

evidence.basis: Repozytorium Akt Rejestrowych (RAR) / Portal Rejestrów Sądowych
evidence.note: Since July 2021 the electronic registration files (including the umowa spółki) can be browsed online by KRS number; documents filed before July 2021 are not available online.

caveats: The umowa spółki is an additional document in the akta rejestrowe, not part of the odpis extract.
Online access via RAR generally limited to filings after July 2021; older articles require a request to the registry court.
May be the original + amendment resolutions rather than a single consolidated text (tekst jednolity).

summary: The odpis aktualny/pełny from the Rejestr Przedsiębiorców KRS is the base register document for a P.S.A., issued free from the official KRS search.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o Krajowym Rejestrze Sądowym, art. 38
evidence.quote: W dziale 1 rejestru przedsiębiorców zamieszcza się następujące dane
evidence.note: Defines the register extract content for the P.S.A.

summary: The odpis aktualny/pełny from the Rejestr Przedsiębiorców KRS is the base register document for an S.A., issued free from the official KRS search.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o Krajowym Rejestrze Sądowym, art. 38
evidence.quote: W dziale 1 rejestru przedsiębiorców zamieszcza się następujące dane
evidence.note: Defines the mandatory content of the register extract for the S.A.

summary: The odpis aktualny/pełny is the base register document for Polish partnerships as well.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o KRS, art. 38
evidence.quote: W dziale 1 rejestru przedsiębiorców zamieszcza się następujące dane
evidence.note: Register extract content covers partnerships.

summary: The current register extract (odpis aktualny) or full extract (odpis pełny) from the Rejestr Przedsiębiorców of the KRS is THE base register document. It is issued/downloadable free of charge from the official KRS search (ekrs.ms.gov.pl / Portal Rejestrów Sądowych) and has the force of an official document.

evidence.basis: Ustawa o Krajowym Rejestrze Sądowym, art. 38 (zakres danych w dziale 1 rejestru przedsiębiorców)
evidence.quote: W dziale 1 rejestru przedsiębiorców zamieszcza się następujące dane
evidence.note: Art. 38 defines the mandatory content of the register extract for each entity, including sp. z o.o.

summary: For a sociedade por quotas the sócios (quota holders) ARE public: the constitutive contract must identify each quota and its holder, and every unification/division/transmission of quotas is itself a registrable fact — so the certidão permanente reflects the CURRENT quota holders. No separate shareholder list document exists; the certidão IS the proof.

evidence.basis: Código das Sociedades Comerciais, art. 199.º al. a)
evidence.quote: O montante de cada quota de capital e a identificação do respectivo titular
evidence.note: Mandatory content of the sociedade por quotas contract.

evidence.basis: Código do Registo Comercial, art. 3.º n.º 1 al. c)
evidence.quote: A unificação, divisão e transmissão de quotas de sociedades por quotas, bem como de partes sociais de sócios comanditários de sociedades em comandita simples
evidence.note: Quota transfers are registrable, so the register tracks current holders.

evidence.basis: Código das Sociedades Comerciais, art. 9.º n.º 1 al. g)
evidence.quote: A quota de capital e a natureza da entrada de cada sócio, bem como os pagamentos efectuados por conta de cada quota

caveats: INFERENCE: no PT law article literally says 'the certidão displays current sócios'; this is the necessary consequence of art. 199.º(a)/9.º(1)(g) (holders identified at constitution) combined with CRC art. 3.º(1)(c) (all quota transmissions registrable). In practice the certidão permanente of a Lda lists current sócios and quota amounts.
UNVERIFIED: exact rendering of holders on the extract not confirmed against a live certidão.

summary: Shares (acções) of an SA are NOT public: CRC art. 3.º(1)(c) makes only transmission of QUOTAS registrable, not acções. Only the founding shareholders appear in the constitutive act; subsequent share transfers are recorded in the company's own share register (livro de registo de acções / registo de valores mobiliários), not in the commercial register. The certidão therefore does not evidence current shareholders of an SA.

evidence.basis: Código do Registo Comercial, art. 3.º n.º 1 al. c)
evidence.quote: A unificação, divisão e transmissão de quotas de sociedades por quotas, bem como de partes sociais de sócios comanditários de sociedades em comandita simples
evidence.note: Lists only quotas (and comanditário parts); acções are absent from the registrable facts, i.e. share transfers are not registered.

caveats: Founding subscribers are named in the registered constitutive act, but that is the constitution snapshot, not a current shareholder list.
EDGE CASE: certain control relationships (domínio total, CSC art. 488.º ff.) are separately registrable and can reveal a 100% parent, but this is not a general shareholder list.
Current shareholders of an SA live in the company-held livro de registo de acções / securities account, not the public registry.

summary: A unipessoal por quotas has a single quota held by the sole sócio; that holder is identified at constitution and any transmission is a registrable fact, so the certidão permanente evidences the current sole quota holder. The certidão is the proof.

evidence.basis: Código das Sociedades Comerciais, art. 199.º al. a)
evidence.quote: O montante de cada quota de capital e a identificação do respectivo titular
evidence.note: Applies to the unipessoal por quotas via CSC art. 270.º-A ff.

evidence.basis: Código do Registo Comercial, art. 3.º n.º 1 al. c)
evidence.quote: A unificação, divisão e transmissão de quotas de sociedades por quotas, bem como de partes sociais de sócios comanditários de sociedades em comandita simples

caveats: INFERENCE from art. 199.º(a) + CRC art. 3.º(1)(c), as for the ordinary Lda; not a literal statutory statement that the certidão displays the sócio.
UNVERIFIED against a live certidão.

documentLocal: pacto social / estatutos atualizados (certidão permanente, variante de estatutos)
summary: The constitution is registered, and the certidão permanente offers a distinct variant delivering the consolidated up-to-date articles ('último pacto social ou os estatutos atualizados'). This is a separate deliverable from the registos extract, hence an additional document from the same registry.

evidence.basis: IRN / gov.pt — Pedir a certidão permanente do registo comercial
evidence.quote: disponibilizar o último pacto social ou os estatutos atualizados
evidence.note: Dedicated 'estatutos' variant of the certidão permanente.

evidence.basis: Código do Registo Comercial, art. 3.º n.º 1 al. a)
evidence.quote: A constituição
evidence.note: Constitution (contrato de sociedade) is filed/registered.

caveats: The 'registos' certidão does not contain the full articles text; the consolidated estatutos are the separate estatutos-atualizados variant.

documentLocal: pacto social / estatutos atualizados (certidão permanente, variante de estatutos)
summary: The SA's constitution (contrato/estatutos) is registered, and the consolidated updated articles are obtainable as the estatutos-atualizados variant of the certidão permanente — a separate deliverable from the registos extract.

evidence.basis: IRN / gov.pt — Pedir a certidão permanente do registo comercial
evidence.quote: disponibilizar o último pacto social ou os estatutos atualizados

evidence.basis: Código do Registo Comercial, art. 3.º n.º 1 al. a)

legalFormLocal: شركة ذات مسؤولية محدودة (Limited Liability Company, W.L.L.)
documentLabel: Commercial Registration extract (partners/ownership section) — alternatively the registered Memorandum of Association
documentLocal: السجل التجاري (بيان الشركاء والحصص) / عقد التأسيس
summary: For a Qatari LLC the partners (شركاء) and their quotas (حصص) are fixed in the registered memorandum of association, and any transfer of an LLC quota must be notarised and registered with MoCI. The Commercial Registration extract for an LLC therefore lists the partners and their ownership percentages, so membership is provable directly from the registry. If a standalone list is required, the registered memorandum of association serves as the equivalent additional document.

evidence.basis: Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015 — LLC provisions: memorandum must state partners and their shares; transfers of quotas must be registered in the Commercial Register
evidence.note: Verbatim text not retrievable (see caveats). LLC quotas are non-negotiable; the register reflects current membership because transfers require amendment/registration.

caveats: INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED: that the CR extract enumerates every partner and exact percentage is based on known Qatar practice, not on a verbatim statutory/MoCI fetch; if a given CR printout omits shareholdings, fall back to the registered Memorandum of Association (proved_by_additional_document).
Statute article numbers not verbatim-confirmed due to source-access failures.

legalFormLocal: شركة مساهمة عامة قطرية (Qatari Public Shareholding Company)
summary: For a QPSC, shares are negotiable securities and the body of shareholders is not recorded in the Commercial Register. The current register of shareholders is maintained by the company and, for listed companies, held in dematerialised form at the Qatar Central Securities Depository (Edaa / QCSD). The Commercial Register only records the founders at incorporation (in the memorandum), not the fluctuating shareholder base, so a current shareholder list cannot be evidenced from the registry.

evidence.basis: Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015 — shares of a public shareholding company are negotiable; shareholder register maintained by the company / (listed) via central depository; Qatar Central Securities Depository (Edaa/QCSD) framework
evidence.note: Verbatim text not retrievable (see caveats). Registry holds founders/memorandum only, not the ongoing shareholder register.

caveats: The company's own share register or a QCSD/Edaa statement can evidence shareholders, but these are private/depository records, not registry documents.
Founders named in the registered memorandum are provable, but this is not a current shareholder list.
Statute article numbers not verbatim-confirmed due to source-access failures — INFERENCE.

legalFormLocal: شركة ذات مسؤولية محدودة (Limited Liability Company, W.L.L.)
documentLabel: Memorandum / Articles of Association of the LLC (filed and notarised with MoCI)
summary: Under Law No. 11 of 2015 an LLC is constituted by a written memorandum of association that must be notarised and registered with MoCI; without registration it is not effective against third parties. This document is the LLC's constitution (German Gesellschaftsvertrag) and is held on the company file at the registry as a distinct document separate from the CR extract, hence an additional document rather than the base extract.

evidence.basis: Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015 — requirement that the company contract/memorandum be in writing, notarised and registered
evidence.note: Verbatim text not retrievable (see caveats). The memorandum is a filed document distinct from the CR extract.

caveats: Third-party retrievability of the filed memorandum from MoCI may require authorisation or be obtained via the company; access is not guaranteed to be open/public.
Statute article numbers not verbatim-confirmed due to source-access failures — INFERENCE from established CCL structure.

legalFormLocal: شركة مساهمة عامة قطرية (Qatari Public Shareholding Company)
documentLabel: Articles of Association and Memorandum of Association of the QPSC (filed with MoCI; published)
summary: A QPSC is constituted by a memorandum of association and articles of association under Law No. 11 of 2015; these must be filed with MoCI and are published. Together they form the company's constitution (German Gesellschaftsvertrag) and exist as distinct filed documents on the registry file, separate from the CR extract, hence an additional document.

evidence.basis: Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015 — public shareholding company memorandum and articles of association; filing/publication requirements
evidence.note: Verbatim text not retrievable (see caveats). The articles/memorandum are filed documents distinct from the CR extract.

caveats: For a listed QPSC the articles of association are typically publicly available (via QFMA/Qatar Stock Exchange disclosures); for unlisted QPSCs retrieval may require authorisation or the company.
Statute article numbers not verbatim-confirmed due to source-access failures — INFERENCE from established CCL structure.

legalFormLocal: شركة ذات مسؤولية محدودة (Limited Liability Company, W.L.L.)
documentLabel: Commercial Registration extract / certificate (Commercial Register printout, MoCI)
documentLocal: مستخرج السجل التجاري / شهادة القيد في السجل التجاري
summary: Every LLC must be entered in the Commercial Register held by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MoCI) under the Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015. The Commercial Registration (CR) extract is the base registry document and states the company's core particulars: trade name, CR number, legal form, capital, objects/activities, registered address and authorised manager(s)/signatories. This is the direct analogue of the German Registerauszug.

evidence.basis: Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015 (general provisions requiring companies to be entered in the Commercial Register); MoCI Commercial Registration service
evidence.note: Verbatim article text could not be retrieved (Al Meezan legal portal failed TLS verification; web-search budget exhausted). MoCI operates the Commercial Register and issues the CR extract/certificate.

caveats: Article numbers not verbatim-verified — Al Meezan (almeezan.qa) and other primary-text hosts returned certificate errors; INFERENCE from established Qatar CCL structure.
Exact CR extract layout/fields is administrative practice by MoCI, not fixed by statute in the fetched sources.

The CR extract is the base registry document showing trade name, CR number, legal form, issued/paid capital, objects, registered address and board/authorised signatories. This is the direct analogue of the German Registerauszug.

evidence.basis: Commercial Companies Law No. 11 of 2015 (public shareholding company provisions; registration in the Commercial Register); MoCI Commercial Registration service

summary: For an SA the shareholders are not held at ONRC. The act constitutiv registered at ONRC records only the founders (fondatori) and the initial subscribed capital, not the evolving shareholder base. Current shareholders are held in the company's own share register (registrul acționarilor) kept by the company or, for nominative dematerialised shares, by an authorised registrar / central depository (depozitar central). No ONRC document evidences the current shareholders of an SA.

evidence.basis: Legea 31/1990 (republicată), Art. 8 lit. d)
evidence.quote: capitalul social subscris și cel vărsat și, în cazul în care societatea are un capital autorizat, cuantumul acestuia
evidence.note: Art. 8 governs the act constitutiv of the SA — it captures founders and subscribed/paid capital, not an ongoing shareholder list.

evidence.basis: Legea 31/1990 (republicată), Art. 177 — registrul acționarilor (register kept by the company / central depository)
evidence.note: The full text of Art. 177 could not be fetched verbatim from the truncated official page; it establishes the company-kept shareholders' register (registrul acționarilor) for nominative shares, held outside ONRC.

caveats: Art. 177 / registrul acționarilor could not be quoted verbatim (source page truncated) — the register's location outside ONRC is asserted from Legea 31/1990's scheme (UNVERIFIED verbatim, but well established).
The founders can be recovered from the certified copy of the SA's act constitutiv, but founders are not the current shareholders, so this does not satisfy a current shareholder list.

documentLabel: Register extract (Certificat constatator) listing associates and social shares
summary: For an SRL the associates (asociați) and the number/nominal value of the social shares (părți sociale) allotted to each are stated in the act constitutiv and are registered data at ONRC; transfers are recorded by mențiuni. The certificat constatator (the base register extract) therefore lists the current associates and their holdings, so a separate shareholder-list document is not needed. This mirrors the AT/CH GmbH pattern where the extract itself evidences the membership.

evidence.basis: Legea 31/1990 (republicată), Art. 7 lit. d)
evidence.quote: capitalul social subscris, cu menționarea aportului fiecărui asociat, în numerar sau în natură, valoarea aportului în natură, modul evaluării acestuia; la societățile cu răspundere limitată se vor preciza numărul și valoarea nominală a părților sociale, precum și numărul părților sociale atribuite fiecărui asociat pentru aportul său
evidence.note: Associates and the number of social shares attributed to each are mandatory content of the act constitutiv, hence registered.

evidence.basis: ONRC — certificat constatator / copii certificate
evidence.note: ONRC issues the certificat constatator which reflects the registered associates of an SRL; the act constitutiv is also available as a certified copy.

caveats: That the certificat constatator lists the current associates with their părți sociale is asserted from ONRC practice and Art. 7 lit. d); no verbatim ONRC field list was fetched (INFERENCE).
If a fully current holding breakdown is required, the certified copy of the latest act constitutiv / mențiuni may be needed as a supporting additional document.

documentLabel: Certified copy of the constitutive act (Act constitutiv / Statut)
summary: The constitution of an SA is the act constitutiv (which may take the form of contract de societate and/or statut). It is filed with ONRC on incorporation and is part of the public register file, obtainable as a certified copy separately from the register extract — hence proved by an additional document.

evidence.basis: Legea 31/1990 (republicată), Art. 8 (content of the act constitutiv for SA)
evidence.quote: capitalul social subscris și cel vărsat și, în cazul în care societatea are un capital autorizat, cuantumul acestuia
evidence.note: Art. 8 lit. d) — the act constitutiv is the constitutional document of the SA.

evidence.basis: ONRC — 'Informatii RC si copii certificate'
evidence.note: ONRC provides certified copies of company acts, including the act constitutiv / statut of an SA.

caveats: For an SA the constitutive act may be split into contract de societate and statut; the certified copy request should cover both (INFERENCE).

documentLabel: Certified copy of the constitutive act (Act constitutiv)
summary: The constitution of an SRL is the act constitutiv, which is filed with ONRC on incorporation and forms part of the public trade-register file. It is obtainable as a certified copy ('copii certificate ale actelor') separately from the register extract, so it is proved by an additional document rather than by the extract itself.

evidence.basis: Legea 31/1990 (republicată), Art. 7 (content of the act constitutiv for SRL)
evidence.quote: asociații care reprezintă și administrează societatea sau administratorii neasociați, datele lor de identificare, durata mandatului, puterile ce li s-au conferit și dacă ei urmează să le exercite împreună sau separat
evidence.note: Art. 7 lit. e) — illustrates the act constitutiv is the constitutional document of the SRL.

evidence.basis: ONRC — 'Informatii RC si copii certificate'
evidence.note: ONRC provides certified copies of company acts, including the act constitutiv, from the register file.

caveats: Whether the current consolidated act constitutiv (post-amendments) is delivered, versus only the original, depends on the ONRC request type (INFERENCE).

summary: As for any company, ONRC issues the certificat constatator for an SA — the register extract equivalent to the Registerauszug. It evidences the company's identification, capital, and administrators, but it does not contain the current shareholders (only the founders appear via the initial act constitutiv).

evidence.basis: ONRC — public services list (certificate constatatoare)
evidence.note: Certificat constatator is issued for all registered companies, including SA.

caveats: The extract does not reflect current shareholders of an SA — see the GESELLSCHAFTERLISTE row.

summary: ONRC (Oficiul Național al Registrului Comerțului) issues the certificat constatator, the official register extract for any registered company. It is the direct equivalent of the Registerauszug and is available on request (online via portal.onrc.ro or in person). For an SRL it reflects the registered data including associates and their shareholding.

evidence.basis: ONRC — public services list (certificate constatatoare; informații RC și copii certificate)
evidence.note: ONRC homepage lists 'Certificate constatatoare' and 'Informatii RC si copii certificate' as obtainable documents/services.

caveats: The exact enumerated content of the certificat constatator was not captured verbatim from an official ONRC schedule; its role as the register extract is well established but the field-by-field content is asserted from general ONRC practice (INFERENCE).

summary: A JSC's current shareholders are held in a shareholders' register (سجل المساهمين), not in the commercial register. For listed/public JSCs the register is maintained by the Securities Depository Center (Edaa), a Tadawul subsidiary; for closed JSCs the company keeps its own register and shares are commonly deposited with Edaa. The Ministry of Commerce commercial register and the bylaws only evidence the founders (المؤسسون) at incorporation, not the live shareholder body, so the current shareholder list is not provable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Companies Law 2022 (Royal Decree M/132), JSC shareholder-register provisions; Edaa (Securities Depository Center), Tadawul
evidence.note: Primary source not fetchable in-session. Founders appear in incorporation documents; the maintained shareholder register sits with the company/Edaa, outside the MC commercial register. UNVERIFIED by fetched text.

caveats: Quote empty: could not fetch verbatim statute text.
Founders (not current shareholders) are evidenced by the incorporation memorandum/bylaws; that is not a live shareholder list.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED — based on M/132 and Edaa/Tadawul structure.

documentLabel: Articles of Association / Memorandum of Association (lists partners and their shares)
summary: An LLC's partners (الشركاء) and their share allocation (الحصص) are stated in the company's memorandum / articles of association (عقد التأسيس), which is filed with and registered by the Ministry of Commerce. The membership is therefore provable, but the carrying document is the registered AoA rather than the CR certificate itself — hence an additional document, not the base extract. There is no separate standalone 'shareholder list' filing equivalent to a German Gesellschafterliste.

evidence.basis: Companies Law 2022 (Royal Decree M/132), LLC memorandum/AoA provisions; Ministry of Commerce
evidence.note: Primary source not fetchable in-session. The CR certificate may also display partner names, but the authoritative partner-and-share allocation lives in the عقد التأسيس. UNVERIFIED by fetched text.

caveats: Quote empty: could not fetch verbatim statute text.
Base-vs-additional is a judgement call: the CR extract can show partner names, but full share breakdown is in the AoA, so classified as additional document.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED — grounded in M/132 knowledge, not a fetched official filing.

documentLabel: Bylaws (Articles of Association), with founders' memorandum of association
summary: The constitution of a JSC is its bylaws / articles of association (النظام الأساسي), accompanied by the founders' memorandum of association (عقد التأسيس). These are filed with and registered/published by the Ministry of Commerce and are obtainable as documents distinct from the CR certificate, so the constitution is provable via this additional registered document.

evidence.basis: Companies Law 2022 (Royal Decree M/132), JSC bylaws/incorporation and publication provisions; Ministry of Commerce
evidence.note: Primary source not fetchable in-session. Registration/publication of JSC bylaws is standard under M/132. UNVERIFIED by fetched text.

documentLabel: Articles of Association / Memorandum of Association
summary: The constitution of an LLC is its memorandum / articles of association (عقد التأسيس), executed by the partners and filed with and registered by the Ministry of Commerce. It is obtainable from the registry as a document distinct from the CR certificate, so the constitution is provable via this additional registered document.

summary: As for all registered companies, the Ministry of Commerce issues a Commercial Registration certificate for a joint stock company. It states the company's particulars — name, CR number, legal form, capital, address, activities and board/management — and is the base register-extract document obtainable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Companies Law 2022 (Royal Decree M/132) and Commercial Register Law; Ministry of Commerce, mc.gov.sa
evidence.note: Primary source not fetchable in-session (TLS/403). UNVERIFIED by fetched text.

caveats: Quote empty: could not fetch verbatim registry text.
INFERENCE/UNVERIFIED — based on MC registry practice and M/132.

summary: The Ministry of Commerce maintains the Commercial Register (السجل التجاري) and issues a Commercial Registration certificate for every registered company. For an LLC this certificate is the direct register-extract equivalent: it states the company's particulars — name, CR number, legal form, capital, registered address, activities and manager(s). It is the base document obtainable from the registry.

evidence.basis: Companies Law 2022 (Royal Decree M/132) and Commercial Register Law; Ministry of Commerce, mc.gov.sa
evidence.note: Primary source not fetchable in-session (TLS-cert / 403 errors on mc.gov.sa and boe.gov.sa). CR certificate as the register extract is established Saudi practice; UNVERIFIED by fetched text.

caveats: Quote empty: could not fetch verbatim statute/registry text (see note).
